reviews.text:
After interviewing a number of attorneys, I retained John Lofton because he was the most knowledgable and straight forward.  John is an excellent lawyer with superb judgment and sills.  He was not distracted by the various ploys employed by the defendants and achieved a great result.  John is personable and easy to work with.
P.S.  I am a Harvard lawyer with fifty years litigation experience, so I know superior legal talent when I find it.  Hire John Lofton and you will not make a mistake.
reviews.ownerResponse: Robert, thank you for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and meaningful review. John Lofton’s knowledge, strategic judgment, and focus are qualities that define the standard of excellence at Aiman-Smith & Marcy. Hearing this level of praise especially from someone with extensive litigation experience reinforces the firm’s commitment to delivering exceptional representation. Your recommendation truly reflects the value of working with a trusted employment law attorney, and it is sincerely appreciated.

reviews.text: I highly recommend John Lofton for his exceptional legal services.  Throughout my case, he was incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and communicative.  Mr. Lofton took the time to understand my situation thoroughly and provided clear, strategic advice every step of the way.   He went above and beyond to ensure a positive outcome.  I am so grateful for his help and would not hesitate to work with him again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Julie, Thank you for the thoughtful review and for placing your trust in Aiman-Smith & Marcy and attorney John Lofton. We are glad our clear guidance, consistent communication, and strategic approach helped you reach a positive outcome. If you ever need assistance in the future, we are here to help.

Thank you so much for the 5-star rating, Serena! We’re thrilled to receive your positive feedback and are grateful for your support. At Aiman-Smith & Marcy, our Oakland law firm is dedicated to excellence in employment law, class action lawsuits, and consumer fraud cases. If you ever need assistance or have any questions in the future, don’t hesitate to reach out. Thanks again for your trust in us!

reviews.text: I can't give more than 5 stars but would. The professionalism and expertise shown by Aiman-Smith & Marcy was top notch. I truly appreciate the personal caring and guidance I was shown.  Brent Robinson provided accurate expectations and his team was great as well. I never felt that I was left in the dark or wondering what was next in the process. I highly recommend this firm and would consult with them first, if the need arises.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the glowing review, William! We’re delighted to hear that your experience with Aiman-Smith & Marcy was exceptional. Our team takes great pride in delivering top-notch professionalism and expertise, particularly in employment law, class action lawsuits, and consumer fraud cases. We’re thrilled that Brent Robinson and our entire team met your expectations and kept you informed throughout the process. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we’re here to support you with any future legal needs. Thanks again for your kind words!

reviews.text: My point of view as well as personal expirience, as a first time clientfor this firm.AMAZng the moment I decided after having in this trials that wouldn't take me seriously give me the time to the time to explain my situation made me feel welcome if you like I actually matter you made me feel welcome like famil When in Doubt call  Aiman-Smith&Marcy are to tell you out.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words and for choosing Aiman-Smith & Marcy as your employment law firm in Oakland. We're thrilled to hear about your positive experience with us. It's always our goal to make every client feel heard, valued, and treated like family, especially during challenging times. Your trust in us is deeply appreciated, and we're glad we could stand by your side. If you have any more questions or need further assistance, we're just a call away. Thank you for being a part of our community!

reviews.text: Please avoid them at all costs. I would give them 0 stars if it was possible. Made blunder in filing and that cost me years. Frequently non responsive, very slow.

The Person who left a review under the name of Chahota Monk is actually a chap named Mr Harshul Singhal who who moved to the UK from the states.
I will not allow his pettiness to continue as he has also defamed our business.

My company has been working with Goswami & Associates for 10+ years. They have incredible service and 100% track record for all the cases we did with them. They always go above and beyond to make sure every little detail is kept in mind. Their entire staff is thorough, professional and Knowledgeable. I will 100% recommend them to everyone who has Immigration needs.

Mr. Goswami is very professional and knowledgeable attorney with 30+ years of experience. I sent a lot of my clients there who need immigration help and every time I got really good feed back from them. He is honest man. Hard to find such people now a days. If you need immigration help, he is the man for the job. Fully recommended.

I had a recent consultation with Mr. Virender Goswami.  Overall experience is quite bad, he is not aware of current law or status of visas. I didnt see professionalism in his replies and all the discussion went like general people talking with each other than a 28 year experienced immigration law authority. He was calling his team and asking whats current status of H1 premium and such small facts.  More over, my research over google search results and forums is better than his responses and his advice is most of the things what I know. As a conclusion, I felt I am fleeced $150 for consultation and  my 3 hours wasted to consult at his office.
Very thorough and knowledgeable Immigration Attorney!!!

My family and i, we have been with our lawyer Deobrah Dyson for more than past 6 years. She has always trusted us and believed in our case. We are really thankful that she went out of her ways and past her work time under reasonable compensation. Our Asylum case was escalated to appellate court and eventually we were granted. Mrs. Dyson was always positive, very professional, detail oriented and of course ethical too.
The Language barrier was there for my parents. We had limited resource to produce evidences. Our truth and effortless work from Mrs. Dyson paid off.
You made a difference in our life. Therefore I really suggest this law firm, Deobrah Dyson is Out standing.

This is a great office, they took care and had the patience to help me get through my case, Including getting back to me when I had questions or updating on how things were going. I was pleased with the outcome and would recommend Michael Hosterman to anyone.
Very pleased with Mike and the whole staff.

He was terrible, he paid  himself before me , His office does not return calls.
After a  week of not returning  calls.  I emailed  you want this case or not . Now he calls.  I eventually  fired him and got attorney  that does return  calls.

Exceptional Legal Representation by Attorney Michael Hosterman and his staff, Jennifer, Pavel, and Cristy:

I had the privilege of being represented by Attorney Michael Hosterman and his outstanding law firm, and I am deeply grateful for the exceptional service I received. Attorney Hosterman's expertise, dedication, and genuine concern for my well-being and that of my family made a significant impact on my experience.

From the outset to the successful resolution of my case involving two different insurance companies, Attorney Hosterman demonstrated unparalleled professionalism and legal acumen. His approach was comprehensive, strategic, and consistently focused on achieving the best possible outcome for me.

Attorney Hosterman's most outstanding quality is his unwavering commitment to client communication. Throughout the entire process, he kept me informed at every step, providing clarity on the legal proceedings, potential outcomes, and ensuring that I felt involved and understood. This level of transparency and open communication instilled confidence in me and alleviated much of the stress associated with legal matters.

What truly distinguishes Attorney Hosterman is his genuine care for his clients. It was evident that he wasn't just representing a case but genuinely cared about the well-being of me and my family. This personal touch made a challenging situation more manageable, and I felt supported every step of the way.

Attorney Hosterman's negotiation skills were nothing short of impressive. He navigated the complexities of dealing with two insurance companies with finesse, securing a settlement that exceeded my expectations. His dedication to my case showcased a commitment to justice and fairness that is truly commendable.

I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Hosterman and his law firm to anyone in need of legal representation. If you're seeking a knowledgeable, compassionate, and results-driven attorney, look no further. Attorney Hosterman has proven himself as a legal advocate who goes above and beyond for his clients, ensuring their rights are protected and justice is served.

Thank you, Michael Hosterman, and your team, for your outstanding representation and unwavering commitment to your clients. I am confident that your continued expertise and dedication will leave an indelible, positive impact on the lives of many. Attorney Hosterman: Where Legal Excellence Meets Compassionate Advocacy.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Marilyn! It was a pleasure to represent you.

reviews.text: I've know Michael for 45 years. He's always been a very professional and honest lawyer. I would recommend him to anyone needing a personal injury attorney. He's kind, thorough and will work hard for you to get the best, most fair settlement.

If you are involved in an accident and need a great lawyer, we highly recommend Atty J. Michael Hosterman.  Consult with him and you will be assured you get the right choice.  That’s what we did and we have never been happier with the results of our case.  We had 2 cases with him which he won for us.  He was very professional, thorough, methodical, open minded, and even considered us more than clients.  He listened well, kept us informed and even made us feel like we’re family to him. His staff too are just awesome, friendly, and responsive to our calls.  Excellent law firm!

Michael is the best injury lawyer I have found around here. I had a car accident, called a few attorneys, but they didn’t want my case because it was a smaller case. I just wanted to settle with the insurance company for a small amount. They didn’t agree to pay me initially, but thanks to Michael representing me, finally at the end the Insurance company had to pay 7 times more. Michael was very honest, professional, diligent and such a friendly person. He deserves five stars. I highly recommend him.

I was referred to Michael through a friend.  I found Mike to be extremely detailed, confident, thorough, and responsive.  My accident involved navigating a complex stream of insurances as Medicare and my secondary insurance.  He handled it all, and I was always able to refer the requests from these insurances to him for processing, which was a major relief for me.  In the end, he negotiated a settlement that I never believed I could receive, and I am very grateful for his knowledgeable abilities in his field.

Mike was a great asset to me and my case. He and his staff were on top of the details of my case and were always going the extra mile for me. I knew I could trust their integrity, abilities and experience. I appreciate all that was brought to the table and the outcome of my case was more than I expected! Thank you Mike and your staff for all that you did! If you are in need of someone who will be on your side, Mike is your guy!

perfect job

I first met and obtained Mr. Raymond Churchill’s  Service in 1999 and then again in 2016. Mr. Churchill provided excellent Customer Service and advise for our Family Living Trust. His expertise over the past 21 years have been outstanding and a blessing. He is very kind, prompt and thorough. I would highly recommend Mr. Churchill for your financial needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Frances Caldwell,  We are incredibly grateful that you took the time out to leave us this note. Our company values put customer satisfaction as the top priority and we are committed to our customers. Its customers like you that make our job wonderful. We look forward to serving you again.

reviews.text: Our family has used Mr. Churchill to establish strong estate planning that has stood the test of time in our subsequent real estate purchases; veteran benefits; business creation; and taxes. Nothing has ever been questioned or made complicated by other institutions and authorities... that has made our lives substantially easier.

Mr. Churchill provided excellent advice as I went through all the legal steps necessary after my father’s death.  Mr. Churchill’s estate law expertise and his great kindness were just what I needed.  I appreciate his efforts and strongly recommend him.

My Wife and I was thinking to put our finances in a trust. Before we began the process, my wife was talking to several law farms before meeting Mr. Raymond F Churchill II.  He was never in rush and answers our questions while providing us with information. Mr. Churchill always provided open and honest opinion and we never felt unduly pressured. After completing the trust, we walked out of Mr. Churchill’s office feeling confident that if anything happened, we would know what to do. He is always there if we need answers.
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Tajul Majumder, Thank you so much for taking the time to leave this excellent review.  We really appreciate your business.  Please let us know if there is anything we can do for you in the future. -Raymond F Churchill II, PLC
Thanks Phil

reviews.text:
Mr. Churchill supplied our family with patience, understanding and the very best legal advice. We had an extremely complex situation because a family member had neglected to have a Will prepared by an Attorney. It had to be unraveled while some in the family fought with others. He never allowed us to not feel positive! The end result was better for all thanks to his advice.

We are very grateful to claim him as our Attorney!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Rev. Whiten.  I appreciate your kind words.

reviews.text: Mr Churcill helped an elderly lady that I was trying to care for. She was having problems with people taking advantage of her. she had also lost a bunch of money in the stock market and didnt know what to do with her remaining funds. He drew up a will and helped her with many legal issues. He is a kind, honest,fair man. He made sure she had her affairs in order and that her money was safe.

Quality Service is a priority for me - Ray provided outstanding service, advice, and recommendations in preparing my legal documents.  He was timely and thorough.  I would and have recommended him to my family and friends.

I created a Trust from Snehal and team in 2022 as part of estate planning. Everything went well until the trust creation part. They were responsive until the trust was created.

The nightmare begins when you need any clarifications from them. My second child was born in 2024. I wanted to know what changes do I need to make. They will never respond to any of your queries. YOU WILL BE GHOSTED. After multiple phone calls to his office, months of email followups, one of their staff Rutuja Deshpande gave a response today (my kid is 1.5 years old now) I need to pay $5000 to make a change. What do we call this place? A scam agency?

I saw a similar review like this where they will not support you after the trust is created.I wish I was properly informed. If you are here to create a Trust as part of estate planning, kindly stay away from this place.

If this is the support we get from them when we are alive, imagine what experience would your beneficiaries get?

Edit: After reading the owners response. First of all I am thankful that I atleast got a proper  response after 1.5 years of phone calls and emails. Ultimately the response - pay $5000 for adding a new born child? Please do not make things complicated than it should be. I dont mind paying but what do I pay for? I sent atleast 10 emails and many phone calls asking what is the procedure. Tell things straight - you dont entertain clients after the insurance expires? Thank you for the lack of empathy ,response all these months and being a nightmare to work with. I STRONGLY REGRET picking your firm to represent my financial needs. STAY AWAY. Today its me, tomorrow its you. They will rip you off for the GREED of money.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Your situation in 2025 is very different from 2022. (i) There are lot more legal complexities in your case now than you'd like to understand -- I can't explain them publicly; (ii) you don't have legal insurance, which means you have to pay for everything out of pocket; and (iii) the type of comprehensive estate plans we now create (covering estate tax planning and asset protection in addition to probate avoidance, especially as they apply to non-U.S. persons) and the fees we charge for them are significantly different (and higher).

We quote our fees based on the complexity of a legal matter, our service offerings, and our current rates; not on what someone paid several years ago! Quoting you a significantly higher fee as a non-insurance client (which is different from what you paid as an insurance client several years ago) does not make us a scam agency in much the same way that just because you cannot afford to pay us does not make you a pauper!

The other review that you ignorantly cite was of a similar person who was "happy" when insurance covered their fees. When they lost insurance and reached out a year or two later, we still gave them a free consultation followed by a fee quote only for them to disappear. After a year, they came back again, availed another consultation and yet again disappeared when it came time to pay us. The third time around when they tried to pull the same trick, I refused to entertain them and then came their "1-star" review!

If you want support for yourself (and your beneficiaries), show the courtesy to pay for it, or at least discuss the pricing or other options. Ranting in a public forum and maligning someone's reputation reflects poorly on your values and not on our value! God bless you!!

reviews.text: Snehal and his team are very professional and helped me in every step of my estate planning.

Snehal B Patil is an exceptional estate planning attorney! From our first meeting, we felt completely at ease and confident in his expertise. He and his team at Indus Counsel expertly guided my husband and I through the often-complex process of creating our wills, trusts, and healthcare directives.  Snehal was incredibly knowledgeable and patient, taking the time to thoroughly explain everything and answer all of our questions. He truly made complex legal concepts easy to understand. We are so grateful for his guidance and highly recommend his services to anyone seeking an outstanding estate planning attorney!

So unprofessional. We had high hope for this place because of the high reviews. We got referred here by CLC then after the consultation call and filled out the form and sent our information over, he never got back to us. I followed up multiple times through email and phone call but not responses. Even if he couldn’t take our case, at least just respond so we know. Very unprofessional. Did not expect that from a law office.
reviews.ownerResponse: On our first call, I had informed you after understanding the facts of your case that there could be adverse financial implications for you based on a certain asset, and that I would need time to figure out the best course of action and come up with a proposal before we can move forward with your case. If you were in some sort of urgency or were looking for a quick-fix, cookie cutter approach, you should have mentioned it to me instead of publishing this ridiculous review merely a couple of weeks after our first call! We have stellar reviews because we provide customized estate plans that, at times, take time especially when there are certain legal complexities. I wish you well though.

reviews.text: We had a great experience of getting our estate plan created by IndUS Counsel. Starting with Snehal who was easily approachable and responsive and who answered all our questions in the beginning and explained the process in detail. Later we interacted with Rutuja and Purva for finalizing the documents. Process was extremely smooth and more importantly they helped us within the short span of time we had to get the plan created. I highly recommend this efficient and professional legal team.

We have recently worked with Snehal and his Team. They have demonstrated amazing professionalism and very knowledgeable on the subject. He took the time to answer all our questions with all the necessary details.

We would absolutely  recommend Indus Counsel services.

One of my friend referred me to IndUS counsel for preparing living trust. I received great support throughout the process from Snehal and his team. This is the first time I have experienced a service provider chasing customers to get things done :). Thank you team IndUS Counsel, and wish you all success!

The service is extremely fantabulous. Snehal is really patient in explaining and very informative. He went above and beyond to explain our questions. Definitely recommend him if you are planning to do will&trust for your family.

I recently had the pleasure of working with IndUS Counsel for my estate planning needs, and I cannot recommend them highly enough. From start to finish, they provided exceptional service and expertise that exceeded my expectations.

The staff at the law firm took the time to listen to my concerns and understand my unique situation. They provided me with valuable insights and recommendations that helped me make informed decisions about my estate planning. They were patient and supportive throughout the entire process, taking the time to answer all of my questions and address any concerns that I had.

What really stood out to me was the level of attention to detail that this law firm provided. They were thorough in their approach, ensuring that every aspect of my estate planning was covered. They were proactive in their communication, keeping me informed at every step of the way. Their professionalism and expertise gave me peace of mind, knowing that my estate planning was in good hands.

In summary, if you are looking for a law firm that provides exceptional estate planning services, I highly recommend IndUS Counsel. Their staff is knowledgeable, professional, and attentive to your needs. They truly go above and beyond to ensure that their clients receive the best possible service.

They are are quite un-responsive when it comes to followups. I was going through a real estate transaction and I called them to work on my estate plan which they originally setup. They scheduled an appointment but cancelled for no reason and never returned my calls or responded to my emails. Seem like scam ppl to me.

Snehal never responds when you would need any legal advise. The new paralegal Purva Parikh is also exactly same.
They will try to convince you to create a template estate plan but they will not provide the support you need to keep it up to date.
After researching more I found some great law firms which not only setup initial estate plan but also teach you how to keep up. They at least always answer your call or give you reasonable followup answers at the very least.

Very clear communication and prompt in following up and meeting the requirements. We were fully educated about our case and all legal terms were clearly explained before guiding us up through subsequent steps. Definitely recommend their services!

We want to take a moment and give a big shout out to Snehal and his Team for their amazing professionalism!

Snehal is very knowledgeable and a man of great patience. He took the time to answer all our questions and ensured that he equipped us with all the necessary information to complete our Will and Trust.

Snehal and his team were prompt in replying to our emails, setting up meetings be it remote or in-person.

We found them to be very organized and their process to be extremely streamlined.

We would absolutely recommend Indus Counsel services.

Thank you Snehal and Team for all your help and guidance in getting our Will and Trust done!!
Snehal gave all the details that are unknown to me and guided all the way from beginning to the completion. He is very organized in all possible ways. I would recommend him for your estate planing.
Snehal and his team explained and guided us through all steps and answered all our questions in a timely manner. He was very thorough in the entire process. We highly recommend their services.

I appreciate the effort that Snehal & his team put in to make the overall process of estate planning so seamless and easy. There was total transparency and clear explanation at every step in the process. We are very impressed with the professionalism and degree of care shown by the IndUS Counsel team. It is hard to find such a dedicated team, and I can vouch for it. I will wholeheartedly refer IndUS Counsel to whoever is thinking about estate planning.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the positive review, Charat. It was a pleasure working on your estate plan. We look forward to working with you in the near future to secure your family's long-term financial goals beyond estate planning.

reviews.text: One of the best practices in the area. We (my three year old daughter and I) had a road accident as pedestrians. We were hit by a car and the most important thing at the time was someone who could lead us through the do's and do not's while also being empathetic about our situation. David Duncan was extremely nice, knowledgeable and thorough with his approach and helped us throughout the case with both expectations and processes. We can wholeheartedly recommend Duncan law firm.

I lost a tooth while biting down on a pebble in black beans at a Mexican restaurant.  My tooth cracked all the way down the middle.  When their insurance carrier denied my claim, I never thought I would find an attorney to take my case.  David Duncan did.  After almost three years of dental visits, due to bone grafts, and an implant post that failed the first time around, it took almost three years to finally be over.  David managed to get a wonderful settlement out of court and I am beyond pleased.  I highly recommend David.  He is honest, professional, and he will fight for you!

While waiting in traffic at the San Mateo Bridge I was rear ended at a high rate of speed. My car was totaled, the accident exacerbated an existing back condition that I already had. I missed a good amount of work and needed a lot of medical attention, that eventually resulted in needing a nerve ablation (termination).

I knew I was going to need an attorney, and I had a lot of choices. The big firms that advertise on TV, the ones I see advertised on billboards on the freeway? I decided I wanted to be represented by a local firm that would give me personalized attention and would know who i was every time I contacted them. So I chose Duncan Law firm. I was instantly comfortable with David and always felt like I was in good hands. He took care of everything, he dealt with the other drivers insurance company so I never had to, he dealt with the very unresponsive staff at my companies HR department to get info about the wages and benefits I missed while out. I always felt that my case was of the utmost importance to him.

I ended up being awarded the full term of the other drivers insurance policy, with no fight. All the money with no fight . It was definitely a win-win for me. I may need to have additional nerve ablations in the future, because the nerve endings eventually grow back, but now I have the money to offset the medical costs and to pay for my pain and suffering.

I would strongly suggest that if you are in the need for a personal injury attorney that you choose David Duncan and Duncan Law Firm.

David Duncan was great a communicating the dialog between the other insurer company. I felt he really max out what I could get. I personally would recommend Duncan Law Firm and David Duncan INCREDIBLE

Excellent experience handling my injury case. David was professional and always answered my emails promptly.
Was a pleasure to work with such an experienced attorney. I wouldn't hesitate to hire Duncan Law Firm in the future if needed. Thank you David!
I worked with David and he was wonderful. We had many hiccups along the way but he was very helpful and accommodating.

I was being hassled to settle my claim by my insurance company in an accident where the other driver was at fault and had the same insurance as I had. My insurance company wouldn't help ME! David Duncan was always available, knowledgable, patient, and when I got my final settlement, trustworthy, as the extra costs beyond the percentage were nominal. I had heard horror stories of lawyers charging exorbitant amounts for every fax and exchange, and was surprised when this wasn't the case. In the settlement hearing he was the same...very knowledgable and professional, yet calm and assuring. I highly recommend the Duncan Law Firm!

We retained the Duncan Law Firm following a serious car accident in which my wife was injured. David Duncan represented us with great skill and professionalism, and truly demonstrated his care for our situation. He made sure that we received the best settlement possible. I would hire him again, and highly recommend the Duncan Law Firm.

You know those commercials on TV, the ones with the people saying how they got ripped off by an insurance company and they wished they'd called a lawyer? I always thought those were made up and exaggerated.
Then I got hit by a minivan, my car totaled, and in the hospital with a fractured breastplate.
My insurance was great, handled everything...except dealing with his insurance company. That's when I called David at Duncan Law Firm. Best decision I ever made. So many things came up dealing with my medical and car insurance as well as the other guy's insurance that would have blind sided me but David handled it all and kept me in the loop the whole time. He even found money I didn't know was there in my own insurance policy!
Don't expect to have anything happen quickly, insurance companies drag their feet. Just knowing David was on top of it and reacting as quickly as possible to everything was a huge weight off my back. His professionalism combined with empathy for my personal situation was more reassuring than can be put into words. I'd recommend to anyone, call them. You'll be glad you did.

David Duncan represented me for my personal injury suit after getting in a bad auto accident on my way to work in late-2014. He was able to settle out of court for much higher than I originally expected, and the process was nearly seamless. His vast knowledge about personal injury law and insurance claims, great negotiation skills, attention to detail, and genuine concern for his clients' welfare make him a great attorney for  personal injury cases. David was quick to respond to my emails, texts, and vms, and he provided me with sound advise throughout the process. Should you ever need help with a personal injury, I recommend calling Duncan Law Firm. 5 stars!

David Duncan is an amazing attorney. Our case was a very challenging case and David made sure to keep us up to date through the entire process. He spent countless hours on our case and eventually got us the outcome that we wanted. He is an incredible lawyer and very well spoken man with class and compassion. He was always available when I had questions and concerns. I would highly recommend David Duncan, he will go above and beyond to make sure you will have a successful case.

Fantastic, professional service start to finish. Duncan Law Firm expertly handled my case, moved things along, advocated for me relentlessly and took time out of his busy day to make sure I was comfortable with everything that occurred. I had a great experience with Mr. Duncan. He is an excellent lawyer that wants you to understand the process. He handled everything while keeping me informed.

Thanks for your help, kindness and support. I appreciate your hard work and getting me great results.

I hired David Duncan to represent me after I was injured in a car wreck and needed an attorney who was licensed in both California and Nevada. He did a great job, kept in contact and got me a fair settlement. I was impressed by his professionalism and high standards, and highly recommend his firm.

Unfortunately, navigating the "law" and your personal rights as an injured party due to negligence is complex.  I found myself in need of an expert that not only understood the law but was also committed to a "realistic" case and outcome.  The process, with David's guidance, was swift and easy.  He did all of the heavy lifting, took extra time to explain the law and the process as well as managed my expectations.   The experience, while not enjoyable and somewhat a waste of precious time, was mitigated by David's professionalism, prompt action and overall optimistic and calm demeanor.  Even the party who was at fault commented on the professionalism and realistic approach summarized in our settlement.   We settled fairly quickly without having to go to court.  I am able to walk away from this experience knowing what was settled on was "fair" and my attorney represented my best interest with integrity.  I would absolutely recommend David's services.

There are a lot of different types of attorneys out there, but none of them quite match the assistance and helpfulness that I received with David. He was very polite, knowledgeable, and was able to accommodate me and my busy schedule. His experience in the law field shined through when he was able to take complicated forms and terms that I knew absolutely nothing about, and turn them into easy to understand and comprehensible words. David genuinely knows his stuff! He is very friendly,easy going, and extremely easy to talk to. He was very punctual and always replied to any questions or concerns I had immediately. My experience working with him was superb, and I would highly recommend him to anyone in need of an injury attorney.

We had to hire Alexander Guillen to help us with an arbitration case against a major EV manufacturer who continued to delay, stall and otherwise obstruct what should have been a quick customer service fix. Alex was a lifesaver and navigated their legal stalls and continued to push and push knowing that they were in the wrong. After about a year and a half of continued stalling, and numerous changing legal teams on the other side, he finally prevailed a few weeks before our scheduled arbitration court hearing when the offending company offered to settle. After a few rounds of lowball offers, we finally reached the level that we were expecting.

Throughout the entire process, Alex would provide updates and analysis of the case and was super communicative, even when the update was simply to tell me we were still waiting.

Great job Alex! Thanks for what you did!

If anyone is looking for a great lawyer for auto-related disputes, he's your man.

Hjghly recommended!

If I could give Alex Guillen 10 stars, it still wouldn't be enough! He worked on my case for 2 years and got me the settlement I needed to repair my credit after being burned by a car dealership. Not only did he get job done, he was even able to negotiate a cash settlement that will allow me to refinance my new car into a better rate now that the derogatory credit is taken care of. I would absolutely recommend this firm!
Great staff John Kitta is a great help

Mr. Kitta handled a property transfer.  He was knowledgeable and professional.  He treated all parties with respect.  He never lost his sense of humor.  I recommend Mr. Kitta if you seek legal advice for property issues.

Although, I have not officially retained Anthony Deichler as my attorney, he has been a superstar in advice and direction to my slip and fall case. He is very experienced and knows both sides of the legal playing field. He has been compassionate and spent time explaining all the legal avenues I have to consider. I have inquired about circumstances in my slip and fall case and Anthony has be priceless. Very experienced, and compassionate. If I pursue this case I only want this man representing me.

Not relavent to me..

I dodge a bullet found a lawyer right after and he explained everything and guided a me through the process. If you want a lawyer go else where.
Thanks, Elise for all your great work!

After my grandmother passed away, my family encountered a serious issue involving an outdated trust document that put my mother’s inheritance at risk. We needed immediate legal help and contacted several attorneys, but Mr. Hewitt stood out for his quick response and willingness to step in.

Mr. Hewitt reviewed the situation right away and took decisive action that helped resolve the problem before it escalated further. Once we retained his firm, he and his team—especially Ms. Foster—handled the estate professionally and thoroughly throughout the probate process.

Although probate took time, they kept us informed, answered all of our questions, and handled everything on our behalf so we never had to appear in court. Their communication was always courteous and professional, and they made a very stressful situation much easier for our family.

I am very grateful for their help and highly recommend Mr. Hewitt and his team at The Law Offices of C. Lee Hewitt.
Mr. Hewitt stated he would take our case and then immediately ghosted us. He left us in a heck of a bind.
Wonderful attorney. Very knowledgeable,helpful and considerate. Recommend for your legal needs.

Where do I start Deborah Hewitt, is an amazing attorney and the best attorney to have in your corner! I can only speak for my personal experience which was a very complexed case! Before I hired her, I was in a losing battle which as single father was hard to lose my two minor children, because I hired prior attorneys who only cared about making money and not about the best interest of me or my children! Deborah Hewitt came in fixing a mess that other attorneys could not accomplish, And stood by my side for almost 3 years in a nasty custody battle! She never gave up on my case and was always available and actually cared about me as a client and my two minor children! She has a heart of gold and will go above and beyond no matter how frustrated I got and I’m sure she remembers my low points in life and actually thought me to be patient which is not my strength especially when it came to my children and was always available for me to vent and educate me on this long custody journey! I remember the hardest thing in life was coming home to an empty house and not having my children with me! Because of Deborah and her advocacy and her relentless pursuit to help me gain full legal and physical custody of my children! She made my a house a home again and because of her I get to drop off my kids and pick them up from kindergarten and preschool! There’s not enough words of  how thankful and grateful, I am of meeting, knowing and having an amazing attorney by my side! for anyone going through anything that I had to!! hopefully you choose her services and I promise you won’t regret it!! She is amazing and the best at what she does!!!

Deborah Hewitt is out for your money only.  No interest in actually helping. She will not do anything you request even though you pay her.  Complete rip off of your money.  I would give zero stars if I could

Lee and Deborah are a class act. We have worked with both of them on separate occasions. There  is only one thing on their mind when presenting the facts. Do it with class, do it with integrity, and do it with an outcome everybody is fair with. It has been a pleasure to work with this law firm for many years and a privilege to have them as my attorneys.

Jeff Bickerton, was referred to me by a center. I was  absolutely unsure and tremendously nervous. Jeff assured me and knew exactly what I was going through. His vast experience reflected though his questions. He pin pointed the issue and the path I was supposed to take. I didn’t have to think twice or look any further. He gave me the confidence, and his relentless support kept me motivated. He answered all my questions, returned all my calls and emails. His patience and precision is admirable. He doesn’t believe in wasting your time and resources. The case went for almost a year and the fee was minimal. The other party involved had the worst experience with the attorney and that made me appreciate Jeff’s professionalism even more. The case went on respectfully and in the best interest of both the parties. I cannot thank him enough for his kindness. No one should have to hire a family law attorney but, if you have come to a point in your life where you have to, then, trust me, Jeff is the man for you.

Jeff Bickerton did an incredible job with my case. Gave me great advice and walked me through the family law process for good value.

For all of you out there dealing with the uncertainty and stress of completing the divorce process, I must recommend that in addition to personally understanding your rights and responsibilities also contact Jeff and be truthful about your situation as he is both eager and capable of helping you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mark, it was a pleasure to work with you.  I am very glad to hear that I was able to help set reasonable expectations an provide you valuable guidance.  Best wishes to you and your family!

Very good firm that pays attention to details. Very responsible firm.

I engaged Mathews & Peddibhotla Law Group last summer for my fiancé's K-1 Visa application. Right from the get go, the team has been very responsive and collaborative in how they've handled the case.

At other law groups, after the initial "pitch," one almost never hears from the attorney once the fee is collected, leaving the entire case at the mercy of paralegal staff. Not so at MPLG. The attorneys (Kalpana, Radhika & Alex) were involved throughout and the paralegal (Barbara) provided awesome support.

The team pulled together a fool-proof, very comprehensive and persuasive case-file for both stages of the K-1 fiancé visa case. And they answered my questions in a timely manner every single time.

A couple of weeks back, my fiancé received her visa approval in Abu Dhabi (UAE). I'm planning to engage this law group again for the Adjustment of Status once my fiancé reaches America and we're married.

Last but not the least, their fee structure is very competitive and reasonable.

Best Immigration attorney I have ever worked with. Very Knowledgeable, ethical and professional team. They are very supporting and communicative. I have worked with many immigration layers but no one comes close to Kalpana and Team. Radhika is the BEST!! I always feel like I am in good hands and whatever they advise is the best way to go!
Definitely recommend this law firm. Had the best experience ever through my employment based green card process.

When I wanted to apply for a green card about a year ago, our search for an immigration attorney led us to Kalpana Peddibhotla’s name that we came across on a news article. Upon meeting with Kalpana, we found her to be not only very knowledgeable and meticulous, but also personable and friendly.

We assumed that ours would be a simple case of adjustment of visa status, but it had its complexities. And we are glad that we got the excellent services of MPLG (Mathews & Peddibhotla Law Group). The immigration visa processes are complicated, and waiting periods are long; it helps a lot to get counseled by learned and experienced attorneys. Kalpana and her colleague Radhika Balaji were with us throughout this journey, always replying to all our questions and concerns very promptly. Kalpana and Radhika gave us the best guidance on RFEs, EAD combo card, etc.

Radhika also accompanied my son and me during my interview and helped us through the process, including preparing us for what to expect during the interview. I would definitely use their services for any of our family’s immigration requirements in the future. They are no doubt the best immigrant attorneys in the Bay Area.

Radhika is an Excellent,very high quality Immigration Attorney and a complete professional to work with her on my moms N400 case interview.  I would rate Radhika very highly and would gladly work with her given the opportunity. She is very responsive, fair, and will provide you the best guidance possible through this process which has only gotten more complicated these days. I would rate Radhika one of the best attorney what I have seen in my 24 years stay in US. If I get opportunity I would like to work again for further endorsements with USCIS they Radhika

We met Ms Kalpana Peddibhotla in one of the naturalization clinics, and since then we were so comfortable discussing our matter with her, started trusting more and more and feel fully confident that we are in safe hands.

She was a great hep to us with our immigration and naturalization process. Highly appreciate the time she spent with us listening and understanding our situation, giving the right legal advice, helping us prepare our case as well as standing by and representing us. We were also greatly helped in following up our case status through the officials and contacts.

Overall we had a great experience working with Ms Kalpana and her team and are very grateful for all the help she provided us. We highly recommend her for any legal assistance that anyone has.

Since last few years I was working with team of experts from MPLG under supervision of Kalpana. They have helped me to process my permanent residency application successfully. I had very positive experience while working with MPLG team of lawyers. The best aspect was the attorney diligently understood my case prior to any application process. They have guided me to arrange proper documents pertaining to my case and my field of work. They also made me understood the basic laws and rules of process to avoid any unnecessary anxiety based on outcome of application status.  I would strongly recommend aspiring immigration beneficiaries to contact MPLG and go through the process, they are very helpful.

I've received consultation from Kalpana for few times regarding  numerous questions on H1-B, Green card, and H4 situations of me and my wife. Every time she exceeds our expectations. Not only is she knowledgeable, super thorough & clear in her replies and advice, she is also very patient, a great listener, and just a very nice person to speak with. Consultation Fees are also very reasonable.

Kalpana is an absolute pleasure to work with. Very highly recommended to anyone seeking immigration services.

Kalpana and her team have been assisting our family with our complicated immigration case for 12+ years. My parents will become US Citizens in the next year due to Kalpana and the team. She continues to provide guidance and assists with filing paperwork with USICS. We would highly recommend her and her team of hardworking and dedicated folks to assist you with your case.

Our company has worked with Kalpana and Soby for several years. MPLG has provided timely advice to keep us ahead of the immigration curve. Through their legal guidance we have been able to achieve success. MPLG has an amazing staff that is dedicated, personable and friendly, and always make you feel that your needs are important and well looked after. I would recommend them to anyone who is looking for immigration and employment counsel.

We are working with Kalpana and her team at MPLG for around 9 years and the experience dealing with the knowledgeable, ethical and professional team has been wonderful!

We reached out to Kalpana for a very-complex I-140 RFE and the moment we reviewed her draft response, we moved all our cases to her firm. There are very few Attorney practices that follow the methodology yet are bold enough to stand to injustice and discriminatory decisions. MPLG is one of them!

Kalpana and Soby make a great one-stop-shop for any Small and Medium business with Immigration, Employment, and Corporate law needs. We have and continue working with Kalpana, Roujin, Ameer, Radhika and many more… and love their support-team of Shana, Shilpa, Lekhini and many more! They add life to the Law Firm.
Awesome service and great Staff! Soby and Kalpana are the best; they are very knowledgeable.

Kalpana and Soby are great attorneys who know their law well. They also understand your requirements and give the right advice which is most suitable to your unique situation.

Kalpana especially goes to great lengths to make sure your legal rights are well protected. We've always had a great experience dealing with this firm.

MPLG Law is our go to firm for many legal challenges that come our way.

I run 2 software services businesses and I have been working with Soby and Kalpana for all our business and immigration visa needs for the past several years.  They are knowledgeable, thorough and hard-working attorneys.
Soby helped in several collection situations and has supported me on numerous agreements and legal documents supporting our software product launches.
Kalpana and her immigration legal team supported dozens of Visas, Green Cards and immigration law situations.
They also have an excellent support team.   Very responsive and go out of the way to support me and my teams needs.  Highly recommend them!
Great lawyer highly recommend got me the most money for my accident and did it professionally as the insurance company did not act professionally. Thank you again Fulvio

I was introduced to Mr. Reuben Donig by one of his opposing attorneys right then and there, I knew he would be stellar. He is one of the very few attorneys that I have ever worked with that Was extremely communicative by phone and by email, and in fact was extremely supportive and ensuring that he closed the case in a timely manner. Reuben has been in the industry for many years has many relationships within the legal system and this is extremely important as a client to understand who the opposing counsel and ensures that I was well prepped prior to my deposition and mediation, on level setting expectations and understanding the process.
Reuben is  dedicated, supportive, and a wonderful, empathetic attorney!! Thank you for all of your hard work and dedication!!

Reuben Donig is an exceptional lawyer who worked tirelessly with my family for the past year to resolve our case. He was always in touch and kept us  up to date every step of the way. Reuben treated every member of our family with the greatest respect, courtesy and professionalism . And beyond being a fantastic Lawyer he is also a GREAT person with tremendous integrity. His staff - Leah and Ingrid are very exceptional as well - kind, courteous and professional! You are in very good hands with Reuben and his staff. Very grateful to have known him!

reviews.text:
I had the privilege of working with Reuben Donig for my bike accident case, and I cannot recommend him highly enough. He was incredibly thoughtful and communicative throughout the entire process, always ensuring I was well-informed about each step.

What truly sets him apart is his big heart and genuine dedication to his clients. He went above and beyond by contributing financially to increase my compensation—a gesture that speaks volumes about his character and commitment to achieving the best outcome for me.

Reuben worked efficiently and with exceptional professionalism, providing clear guidance and sound advice that helped me navigate the complexities of my case. I deeply value his expertise and would not hesitate to work with him again or recommend him to anyone in need of a dedicated and compassionate lawyer.

Thank you, Reuben, for your outstanding work and for truly making a difference in my life.
I just called 4x to see if it was a fluke however each time my call went to the voicemail. It is only 9:35am PST so I'm confused. Is the office closed? Is no one answering the phones?

I used the attorney services of Reuben Donig for a vehicle accident and separately for a condominium flood. If i could give Reuben 10 stars it would be justified. As my lawyer, Reuben proved to be Knowledgeable, Well versed in the strategy of claim adjusters, and very reasonable when settling a case. Reuben uses his extensive background and years of experience to (Win) and support you. An Attorney of Reuben caliber are hard to find. If you happen to need his attorney services, i recommend contacting his office in San Carlos office.

To Whom it May Concern:
My daughter hired Mr. Donig based on the recommendation of a friend.  My daughter was hit by a car as she was crossing a street in San Francisco.  It was a somewhat complicated case and due to Covid the courts were closed and the case has gone on for several years.  Mr. Donig presents immense experience and expertise in this field.  He is professional and smart and persistent.  He always had my daughter's best interests in mind.  The case has been settled out of court now and we are all pleased with the outcome.
Thank you Reuben for your diligent work.
We recommend Mr. Donig and his staff highly.
Sincerely,
Lorna Hasbrouck

I hired Mr. Donig for a case that was dragging out and had already been in litigation just short of two years. He was amazing and got me a great settlement. He was responsive and very kind and understanding. I would hire him again and have already referred others to him. You won’t be disappointed. He is professional and great at what he does.
Very informative , professional  and thorough on phone. No cost.

He is a wonderful, knowledgeable lawyer and works in the best interest of his client. He settled my case in the best way possible. Any time I call him he is available to answer my question, and if it's not related to his expertise he will point me to the right direction.

I rarely write reviews, but Reuben Donig delivers a service that simply must be acknowledged. Let me start by saying that I hope that you are never in a situation where you need a personal injury attorney, but if you are, then you must investigate hiring Reuben. Of course I wish I was not hurt in the first place, but Reuben helped me get a recovery that I never imagined possible.

He has all of the qualities that one could ever wish for in an attorney. He was compassionate about my injury while still being tough on our opponents. (To be clear it's the "good tough" NOT the tough that earns an attorney a bad reputation as hard to work with). He has unsurpassed integrity, worked tirelessly on my behalf (to the point of giving me rides when I could not drive), seems to know most of the key players in the industry, does not let even the smallest detail slip through the cracks, and is simply a true gentleman. I saw him in action on many occasions, and he thinks fast on his feet and has the respect of his peers. I thank my lucky stars that I found Reuben and will forever be grateful to him for his advocacy.

I would give him 6 stars if I could!

Full disclosure: I have used a pen name to write this review in order to keep my personal information private.

Mr. Reuben helped me settle my car accident case last year. I was very impressed not only by his professional knowledge and experience but his compassion and care for his clients. He guided me patiently through the legal procedures and offered me great advice at different stages of the case. With his assistance I was able to set my heart at ease while going through the two difficult years of recovery from the injuries. With his relentless effort I succeeded in getting the compensation I asked for out of court and above all, the justice I aspired for after the accident. Thank you, Mr. Reuben.

Jane Zhu

After a fall I believed was a result of negligent caregiving, I found myself in a classic 'he said she said' personal injury situation.  I called numerous law firms in San Mateo county and without exception, I endured one "not worth pursuing' response after another. Three months of searching for representation, given the above, caused almost as much mental anguish on par with the physical pain I endured from my injury. I was lamenting this during a subsequent visit with my personal care physician and he suggested I call Mr Donig's office.  My PCP stated several of his patients communicated positive experiences based on facts. Mr Donig's willingness to be an advocate different from 'all others' resulted in a settlement that 'all others' stated could never occur. I must admit my exhaustive search overlooked a professional with over four decades of personal injury litigation in San Mateo County.
Just wow
5 star labor law attorney

Melinda Garcia and her partner Tod Gurney are the best.  They truly care about their clients and developing the best solutions for them at a reasonable cost.  What's more, they have a wide breadth of experience so they can help with many legal issues that arise for business owners, from employment matters to business transactions and business litigation.  They also have a wide range of contacts to help clients with matters they don't specialize in.  I highly recommend Garcia & Gurney.
Best Employment Attorney in Pleasanton.
Very professional. Tried to work every angle in a DMV case. Very fair and consise in our interactions.

reviews.text:
I’m incredibly grateful for the outstanding representation I received from Adam during my cases. From the very beginning, his always professional, honest, and compassionate. He explained every step of the process in a way I could understand and always made sure I felt supported and informed.

What impressed me most was their attention to detail and his commitment to fighting for the best possible outcome. Thanks to his hard work and expertise, my case was handled smoothly and with far less stress than I expected.
Excellent attorney. Thanks to his expertise, Adam was able to get the charges dismissed.

Adam is absolutely outstanding — 100% perfect if you need any legal support.

When I found myself involved in a criminal case, I reached out to several attorneys in the South Bay. Adam immediately stood out. He was patient, took the time to understand every detail of my situation, and truly listened to my concerns. While many other lawyers seemed focused only on fees, Adam genuinely cared about helping me.

Throughout the lawsuit, he stayed by my side and pursued every possible avenue to have the case dismissed. His dedication, professionalism, and compassion made an extremely difficult time much easier.

After three and a half years, my case was finally dismissed!!! My life and business become brighter, and I truly believe in justice again — thanks to Adam’s unwavering support.

I wholeheartedly recommend Adam to anyone looking for knowledgeable, trustworthy, and genuinely supportive legal representation.

I couldn’t be more grateful for the incredible work my DUI attorney did on my case. From day one, they were professional, knowledgeable, and truly cared about my situation. They explained every step of the process clearly, always kept me updated, and answered all my questions with patience.

What impressed me the most was their dedication and strategy — they fought hard for me and made me feel confident even during the most stressful moments. Thanks to their expertise, I got the best possible outcome in my case.

If you ever need a DUI lawyer who is trustworthy, responsive, and will go above and beyond for you, I highly recommend Adam Allen, The Arant Law Group!. They are simply the best!

So…… how should I start.

I am very grateful that Johanna decided to represent me as my personal injury lawyer. I was involved with a crash about a year ago. When I was calling her for help I think I was in the most stressful/depressing stage of my life, so far.

She was very diligent, she was very responsive in our communication. She was also very helpful. When she was writing the documents for me, I was impressed by her meticulousness because all of the details of the accident including the dates, the location and the sequence of the events were all accurate. Please believe me when I say this: For legal documents, there are lots of details, it takes more than knowledge of the law to get all of them correct.

In short , it was a privilege to have her  represented me. I would not hesitate to recommend her to my friends who need legal support for personal injury case.

If you've already hired him, I suggest Insisting on a detailed itemized bill for how hours and when hours were spent. He did not provide this when I asked, but there was some effort shown after the request. In short, I paid $2.5k with the expectation he would at least show up to court. Shortly before the court date, he advised that I would be getting another bill for him showing up to court.  I said I had already paid for that, but I'm open to it if he gives me an itemized bill for any work he's already done.

I showed up alone and was asked "who is your attorney and where are they? "  I mentioned how much I paid him and that he wanted more before he would show up. There was an eye-roll and direction given to "Get him here in 30min or less".  I can only verify my own experience, but my perception at the time was that this wasn't the first time this kind of happened.   He was still late, but to his credit he arrived within 20min!  He was clearly not happy with being forced to show up without more money, but to his credit he did do the minimum by showing up.

For what it's worth. The first day I met him he mentions that he "volunteers" at a prison to give initial consultations to prisoners about their cases.  If any of the prisoner's families are reading this, maybe Better Call Saul instead.

This guy is an attorney of course so
The lawyer is quite professional and kind! From day one, he made me feel confident and supported. His attention to detail and commitment to my case were second to none."

Our family has been using Mr. Trump for years! He is professional, kind and knowledgeable. We trust him completely. Daphne has helped me personally as well and a true ally.. The staff is always thoughtful and available.  A+
Gave me some very worthwhile advice about a legal concern even though it wasn't what he represents for, helped me locate useful services. Very friendly.
Mr. Batchelder is an excellent lawyer, trusted by his clients, who obtains good results.

I highly recommend Mr. Batchelder. He is a highly qualified, experienced professional with great integrity and a genuinely decent human being. He addressed my concerns and never made me feel like I was wasting his time. He responded to my calls and emails promptly. He helped me get the care I needed  and settled my case successfully.

After a life altering injury on the job in 2019; and surgery leaving me in worse condition; I felt so overwhelmed.  I knew I could not take on such a large company by myself.  I knew I needed professional help., which lead me to Greg Batchelder. After meeting with  Mr. Batchelder and turning my case over to him, I immediately felt so relieved.  He made sure my case was handled properly, keeping me informed of every step.  Regardless of how long the case was drawn out by the other party, Mr. Batchelder tirelessly dedicated himself on my behalf.
I highly recommend Mr. Batchelder for any workers compensation issues you may have.
I can’t express enough gratitude Mr. Batchelder for everything  you have done for me.
Mr. Taylor is very nice man . And he knows how to handle the situation like I have with my divorce case.
I highly recommend Andree Taylor. He fought for us day in and day out. If you want an attornery that will fight for you hire him. He is very personable and intelligent.

I want to admire about him. He is not like other attorneys who drained you with large bills. He care about you and your finances. Other attorneys will bill you for 16 hours for paperwork and he can do it in two hours. He is very honest which is very rare in this industry. He is smart and empathic. Does his job well he is more effective than offensive and expensive. I always feel very safe with him in front of my abuser.
Awesome attorney Mr Taylor was ready for trial with short notice . He returned me every phone call and answered all my questions within A timely manner i would HIGHLY recommend

Andree is one of the best lawyer's out there. We had a difficult custody battle but Andree showed up to each hearing and did not disappoint by being professional and always put my ex in his place and got the job done. He was always there to answer all my questions. If I ever need another lawyer I'd hire Andree no questions asked. I can't thank him enough for how amazing he was!

All these 5 star reviews are exactly who he is. If there were more stars he'd get them.  After a 9 year divorce with the wrong lawyer I lost 2 houses most of our possessions and then I found Andree I was broke and he worked with me on everything. Including adding me in when he was full. None of the other lawyers would budge. Andree, in less than a year stopped the madness and there was enough money left that the courts held from me; for the kids and I to find residency.  I can't thank him enough. He is the most kind respectful lawyer who fought for my kids and myself against a dirty, manipulative, dubious, lying lawyer that my ex had. He knew all the right things to say. Even against her unprofessional twisted false accusations and tales of his and her fantasies.  None of which were true. She constantly referred to herself as a good mother, which has nothing to do with the case, as she subpoenaed my son when he was a minor not caring about him at all.  I can't thank Andree enough for him just being him!

I was in a really bad accident. My friend told me about a personal injury attorney, and I gave them a call. Im glad I called Taylor Solano & Associates. They were understanding and friendly. The best part is that they are very aggressive to get all they can for you. They fight to win. I recommend them.

These people are great! I was going through a horrible divorce with a bad attorney. I thought my life was over. I fired my bad attorney and hired these guys. Wow! They charged me less per hour and did all the things my old attorney should have done. They helped change my life for the better.!!!
Laura is great at both listening and explaining, and I love how fast this business reacted to my inquiry, which was vital during a stressful time!

I had a very time sensitive severance situation and requested guidance from the firm. Laura got back to me promptly, and provided me with ample context and situational suggestions to help me navigate my employment situation.

She was incredibly kind, and offered her time and resources to me during a stressful time. I'm appreciative that she took time out of her day to provide consult and knowledge, without charging me for the advice and initial consultation. I highly recommend reaching out to them for their services and they will be my first call if I need employment attorneys in the future.

I had a great initial call with the law clerk, Chloe.  Laura then followed up with me very quickly.  Laura answered all my questions and gave me great, honest guidance.
They also have a great blog about employment law.
The communication with this firm is excellent and I recommend them!

I haven't hired an attorney from this law firm yet but whenever I send them emails regarding employment or injury related questions, they respond promptly and schedule a call back to clarify everything. Laura called me immediately and explained all the information I was looking for. She is a gem. No doubt, I'll be hiring them in the future if any thing happens.
Laura and team were unbelievable in helping me with my situation. From initial consultation to closure, they were responsive, professional, and incredibly informative. Would recommend to anyone

Laura Mazza was incredibly helpful as well as compassionate with me. She provided me with an amazing 30 minute consultation that not only gave me guidance as to how to proceed, but offered me support and compassion for the situation I was in. She also gave me excellent and realistic advice as to how to protect myself in the face of new, corporate management that was attempting to force me out of my 9+ year job without any unemployment support. With her help, I was able to negotiate a small severance package as well as an assurance that my employers would not deny my unemployment request. I am very grateful for her assistance and would definitely use her again.

Laura Mazza, partner at  Bain Mazza & Debski has been great to work with. She was quick to respond to any question that I had and has helped me every step of the way with my case.
This was my first time dealing with the legal system, and I did not know what to do or where to turn. She explained everything that was going to happen and was always responsive to my questions and concerns.  She took the time to explain my options so I could weigh the pros and cons of each and come to a conclusion together. I would highly recommend Laura Mazza.
I am very lucky to have had her on my side.
I never hesitate to refer clients to this great group of attorneys.  They are sharp, kind, and wonderfully communicative.  Highly recommend!

The attorneys of Bain Mazza & Debski LLP are among the elite plaintiffs' employment attorneys in the Bay Area.  As one of their colleagues who represents individuals in denied ERISA claims for benefits, I regularly turn to Bain Mazza for advice about the non-ERISA employment aspects of my clients' claims.  If a close friend or family member needed an employment attorney I would put Bain Mazza on the top of list of referrals.  You're in good hands with this incredible group of attorneys.

I’m so thankful to Kathryn Bain for all the help she provided with regards to my employment case, and for relieving me and my family from the horrors that we were experiencing for more than a year. Before contacting BMD Legal, I contacted another employment attorney in Fremont, who was least interested in helping me but was much interested in trying every possibility to get my money. I lost all my hope after that incident, but wanted to give BMD Legal a try, based on the positive reviews about them on the internet.
I’M VERY GLAD THAT I CONTACTED BMD Legal, AND WILL FOREVER BE GRATEFUL TO KATHRYN BAIN for all the efforts she made to make sure I don’t have to worry about this case for the rest of my life.
My whole family suffered a lot, for more than a year since this case started, but Kathryn was there to help me in each and every step. She went above and beyond her abilities to make sure that I was happy, and made every attempt to clarify any questions I had. I was lured into settlement multiple times by the opposite party, but returned with an empty hand each time, only to find out that it was a tactic used by them to drag the case as long as they can.
KATHRYN WAS SO PATIENT, KIND, AND GENUINELY CONCERNED FROM THE VERY BEGINNING, and I can confidently say SHE IS A GEM WHO IS MUCH INTERESTED IN SERVING THE SOCIETY THROUGH HER PROFESSION, THAN USING IT TO MAKE MONEY. She patiently went through all my documents, emails, contracts, etc. and spent multiple hours to review every agreement, to make sure there are no clauses that can backfire on me. She explained me about the hidden traps that were included in the settlement agreement offered by the opposite party, and corrected it word by word so that they cannot use it against me in the future.
When it came to a point that the case might be transferred to another judiciary where BMD Legal does not practice (Luckily, it did not happen, and the case stayed within California), she graciously offered me with contacts of her friends, who can help me with the case in that judiciary. She encouraged me with her kind words and advice, and I always felt like I was discussing the case with my friend than with an attorney. She is extremely knowledgeable in labor laws, which boosted my confidence, and allayed my fears.
For all the help she offered, and for the countless hours of efforts that she spent on my case, SHE REFUSED TO ACCEPT ANY FEES from me, when she came to know that I agreed for a settlement with no financial benefits. I HAVE NEVER SEEN A GENUINELY COMPASSIONATE ATTORNEY AS KATHRYN IN MY ENTIRE LIFE, AND I WILL NEVER BE ABLE TO REPAY HER FOR ALL THE KIND DEEDS SHE HAD DONE IN THE LIVES OF ME AND MY FAMILY.
If you’re looking for legal advice related to employment cases in the Bay Area, look no further. KATHRYN IS ONE OF THE BEST EMPLOYMENT ATTORNEYS, WHO WILL MAKE EVERY EFFORT TO MAKE SURE YOU GET JUSTICE. She is one of the few attorneys that doesn’t about money, and acts in the best interests of her clients. If you feel you’re wrongly being targeted by the other party, give BMD Legal a call for a free legal consultation, and I’m sure they will help you get out of your misery, and make sure you never have to worry about it for the rest of your life.
I’m thankful to Kathryn for using her GOD-given talents for the betterment of society, and to transform people’s lives for the better. I would recommend Kathryn in a heartbeat, and pray that GOD bless her with all the happiness, and that she continue to be a blessing in the lives of many, for years to come.
Call and consult with Laura Mazza first.  Just few minutes on the phone brought me enlightenment.

My experience with this firm was outstanding. Katie and Laura were both very experienced with the labor laws and were attentive to my questions and case. At a time when a situation can be stressful and overwhelming, they were able to ease my concerns quickly and always communicated my options. I would refer Bain, Mazza & Debski for their dedication, knowledge, and professionalism that shows exemplary results. Thank you!

Had a very difficult case with Anthony after having 3 other attorneys take my money and not do what I was paying for. He got me to the finish line and got my money back. Very reasonable fees. Thanks Anthony

I had a stellar experience here. Anthony was receptive and quick to action. He consistently had my best interests in mind and we were able to resolve things way quicker than I had anticipated. So happy with the outcome, if I ever need an attorney again this is where I’ll go.
Excellent attorney. Very diligent, methodical, and effective. Would highly recommend.
An amazing lawyer who is super professional. He is genuinely such a good guy. He spends hours on free projects. He really cares.

After some disturbing news from my doctor I needed to get a will, durable power of attorney, and Advance Care Directive in place quickly. I called 7 or 8 legal firms locally to ask if they could help me with this quickly after explaining the situation. They were polite (mostly) but not interested or able due to work load. The best I got was a promise of a call back soon. I tried one more number, Law Offices of Mark Cohen and explained the situation to the polite receptionist Dona and she connected me to C. Lee Hewitt an attorney at law there and he said he had to be in court that afternoon but if I could come down he would help me work this through before he had to leave for the day. He was understanding, professional, knowable, kind, and genuinely concerned for me and my situation. We discussed and reviewed what was needed and he then made arrangements for he and staff to work through their lunches to draw up the documents, arrange for the notary and 3 witnesses and within 2 hours I was walking out with exactly the 3 documents I needed. I cannot recommend Lee enough.

The only lawyer that put his clients best interest first. We will always be great full for all he has done for our family. We feel he is a part of our family. If anyone is looking for a lawyer they can trust Cornell T Solomon is the only one we can trust. The professional Industry needs more layers like him. We recommend him  you are in good hands with Mr. Solomon.
Highly recommend.

I was at the wrong place @ the wrong time and was being  charged for a crime I didn't commit. This awesome lawyer believed in me as well as faught for me until my case was completely dismissed. Your the best Mr. Solomon!!

If you’re under the age of thirty just literally don’t even bother here or really with any of these other pretentious Bay Area lawyers. Was literally told to apply and see if I get a hearing, then he’d take the case. lol okay buddy I can finish it myself at that point. Just truly unprofessional ageist people working these jobs. Which is funny because you’re suppose to help the disabled, it’s like being a teacher and hating kids -_- Funniest thing is having my mom call instead helped atleast being listened to, so I /know/ the unprofessional attitude was for a reason.
