reviews.text:
I had a great experience working with Earl L. Jiang, Attorney at Law after my recent car accident. It was a three-car collision where my vehicle was the first car and was hit twice by the other two cars. The situation was stressful and complicated, but their team handled everything professionally from start to finish.

They managed all communications with the insurance companies, which made the entire process completely worry-free for me. Thanks to their hard work, I was able to receive a sufficient settlement for my case.

A special thank you to Eva, the assistant, who was most helpful throughout the process. She was responsive, patient, and always willing to answer my questions. I truly appreciate the support and highly recommend this law office to anyone who needs a reliable and dedicated attorney after an accident.

Earl was a great guy! He took the time to help me out and answer my questions. He was honest and cared about my case. I would recommend him for a car accident/bodily injury representation. What makes him stand out is his honesty and he will not BS you or mislead you like most attorney’s which is rare to say the least. If you want someone honest he is definitely the one.

You're so professional lawyer.
Great job you did it. Thank you so much

I paid one hour consulting fee to Earl. He was very impatient and rude. Although I bring him all the evidence, ask him several times to read it he looked at it for few seconds didn’t even read. He asked for $10,000 I asked, can you please break it down? How are you going to spend this much time? He said he’s gonna do some research although I bring him all the evidence he did not even look through. He got upset this is my price. Didn’t even give me a clear answer. It was just a waste of time and money. I don’t think he cares about the case all he cares about money. I would not recommend Earl. Both Eva or Earl didn’t return my calls.

I am very grateful to Attorney Jiang and Eva for helping me with my divorce case. They were very understanding of my difficulties and needs, kept in touch with me at all times, and provided me with all the details and advice without reservation. I highly recommend Attorney Jiang and Eva. They are absolutely trustworthy, and their fees are transparent, with absolutely no hidden fees. Thank you again, Attorney Jiang and Eva.

I am incredibly grateful for Earl Jiang team's dedication, expertise, strong advocacy, and the successful outcome they achieved in my case. I truly appreciate Eva's professionalism, clear communication, and ability to explain complex legal issues, which made a significant difference in my experience..
Eva is a very professional and patient assistant. She handled the car accident for me with her professional knowledge. I am very grateful to Eva and Lawyer Jiang for their help.

My overall experience with Law Office of Earl L. Jiang was great! Eva is very patient and responsible. Mr. Jiang is professional. He explained everything about my case detailly and provided suggestion. I only give 4 stars because I have to ask the current status of my case rather than they keep me update, but they response quickly most of the time.

Thank you so much, Attorney Jiang! As a defense lawyer, he's very considerate of his clients, proactively fighting for their interests and minimizing their losses. He's also very efficient and charges reasonable fees. I highly recommend such a conscientious attorney!
Super professional and experienced. The case goes exactly as Mr. Jiang explained to me at the first meeting. Eva is super helpful and responsible. Highly recommend!
I must say,one of the best lawyers around the Fremont area , although it's hard getting into the building to see them,!!!
Eva helped us in the case with her excellent expertise and professional communication skills. Highly recommended!
The car accident case has been delayed for a month. They don't say whether to accept it or not. It's like this every time I accept a case. I wonder what will happen after I accept the case.

Mr. Jiang is very professional and experienced lawyer while Eva is knowledgeable and very helpful in resolving my case. Appreciate their legal assistance in tough time and recommend them to these in need.

Mr Earl Jiang is a very honest and knowledgeable lawyer I have never met. My wife and I brought a injury case to his law firm. The case was small, but he spent more than two hours explain the situation and  provided recommendations without charge any. Following his advise, we settled the case with other party and got paid.
Few years passed till now, my wife and I still memories that he and Eva, his assistant did nice things to us.
In my case, it could be kinda hard to hear the truth and what will happen but just following Earl’s direction and be patient with the case, there will be a good result.

I was his former client. Sharing my experiences with him.

He doesn't fight for your interests. He is misleading and hides information from you. He is unresponsive and irresponsible. He is arrogant and ignorant.
He is deceptive. He doesn't work for you but work for the other party to force you. Many reviews are fake. Bad reviews were removed. Be alerted and be vigilant.

Not sure if this review can survive. LOL.

Mr. Jiang is a very professional and knowledgeable lawyer & gentleman. He helped me and also being very supportive when I am facing a terrible situation. Ms. Eva is a very nice person, she explains all the terms I do not understand patiently but also gives me a lot of advice that I will definitely remember in the future.
The team is very efficient and sincere. You should never have any concerns, you can fully trust them. Thanks to the team again!

It baffles me that all the reviews here are 5 stars, my experience with them is absolutely the opposite. Eva is great. She's responsive, patient and friendly. But my initial consultation with Earl was frankly quite terrible. I don't know if it was something I said that offended him. He seemed very impatient with me. Yes, I don't understand any of the legal terms, and frankly, I have no idea how any of the legal system works. That's why I wanted to CONSULT you, and I paid for your time! I left the meeting 10min early because I couldn't stand the hostile environment. Sorry for the folks who gave him 5 stars, this just didn't work out for me.

[update] The firm reached out to me and apologized for not meeting my expectation. I appreciate they took the time to follow up with me and to listen to what I have to say. I'm sorry that things didn't work out for us, but the fact that they are being open and honest about feedback, and willing to improve their service. I think they deserve a chance.

Atty Jiang and Eva was very helpful and very supportive. Our family was going through a rough time 4 years ago when my daughter and I got into a horrible car accident which taken her life. They took care of everything for me. They've gone extra mile to make sure that I didn't have to worry about the legal stuff. They are very professional, very knowledgeable and very nice people. They respond quickly when I needed answers to some of my concerns. I'm very grateful for them.

With Mr. Jiang's extraordinary knowledge in the profession has made my case easier to comprehend, and resolve quickly with ease. The whole paralegal team has been a pleasure to work with.

While my son was at summer school in San Francisco area and we parents were outside of US, Judy drove a long way during weekend, picked up my son from summer school, and oversaw the medical exam process, which helped a lot to expedite the overall application process.

The best immigration attorneys ever!

Tricia Wang is an exceptionally professional lawyer, skilled, experienced, and creative. She customized solutions specifically tailored to my case. Her assistant—Judy is also incredibly professional and patient—she’s efficient, productive, and kind! This is the first time I’ve ever left a review on Google or an app, but they truly deserve it.

Recently, I received an RFE (Request for Evidence) letter from USCIS, my case was very challenging. I consulted with at least seven other lawyers, most of whom said I might be rejected for my green card application. Two others believed I had a chance, but their advice wasn’t satisfactory. I feel incredibly lucky that my research led me to Tricia Wang and Judy! They saved me both time and money.

We spent a week discussing and strategizing my case, then another week preparing all the necessary materials. In just two weeks, they helped me submit everything. The materials were delivered on 03/18/2025, USCIS received them on 03/20/2025, and my case was approved on 04/04/2025.

I highly recommend them—trust them, they are the best!

reviews.ownerResponse:
We got this kind of review before, so we are familiar with the tactics of the reviewer.
We have thoroughly checked our records and found no record of ever serving this namuganyi Sumaiyah Muhammad nor had any previous contact with this person.

We are committed to provide first-class service to our clients. Whenever we have a client who tells us they are unhappy in any aspect of our service, we take it seriously and do the best we can to correct or improve. As a reward to our efforts, we have built a great reputation for our business.
We suspect two reasons for this particular review. One may be from our competitors, though this seems unlikely. The other is from those who tried too hard to seek a financial gain for themselves. We frequently got solicitation emails offering to remove negative Google reviews for us. It wouldn’t be a surprise for us if these same individuals wrote negative reviews about you and then offer to remove it for you, for a fee! “Without Attorney Wang and his team, we would never have reached where we are today.”
— A genuine testimonial from a client who was granted asylum in October 2025

Before going through the immigration process myself, I never imagined that immigration law could be so complex.
For ordinary people, the legal language is difficult and deep, and a single small mistake can derail an entire case. Our family was under tremendous pressure at that time, and we had no idea whether our case had any real chance.

It was at that moment that we found Attorney Wang’s team—and our lives truly took a new direction.
Attorney Wang has been practicing immigration law since 1993. His experience far surpasses that of any lawyer we had consulted before.
He can immediately identify the key issues in a case, the risks involved, what evidence needs to be supplemented, and how testimony should be prepared.
Problems we once thought were extremely difficult suddenly became clear, manageable, and structured under his guidance.
He not only found the breakthrough points for us but also developed a complete strategy that ultimately helped our family successfully obtain asylum.

We sincerely believe:
Choosing the right attorney can determine the future of an entire family.

Legal Assistant Miao Ling: Exceptional Thoroughness and Reassuring Patience
Preparing the case materials was the part we struggled with the most—complicated, overwhelming, error-prone, and requiring repeated verification.
Legal assistant Miao Ling handled all of this for us with precision and care.

She:

organized every document meticulously,

confirmed every detail repeatedly,

responded to our questions promptly,

and reviewed each piece of evidence down to the wording.

To be honest, this work is exhausting and time-consuming, but she never cut corners.
Our whole family could feel that she genuinely wanted us to succeed.
Many times, her patience and thoroughness were what calmed our anxiety.

“It is because of them that we are finally standing in a safe place.”

Looking back at the entire process, we know very clearly:
Without Attorney Wang’s professional judgment, and without the assistant’s careful preparation,
we would not have today’s outcome.

Now, thinking back, we are grateful we made the right choice.
We experienced the stress, anxiety, and uncertainty of the immigration process—
We worried that our lack of legal knowledge would lead us to make critical mistakes—
We desperately needed someone truly responsible to guide us, protect us, and fight for us—

Thankfully, we found Attorney Wang’s team.
Their experience, dedication, and professionalism can truly change the future of a family—
just as they changed ours.

Our deepest gratitude to Attorney Wang and his team!

After nine long years, our case was finally approved! Huge thanks to Attorney Wang and his amazing assistant Miao Ling.

Mr. Wang is truly professional, sharp, and dedicated. From the first consultation, he quickly found the key points that made our case strong. Before the hearing, he prepared us thoroughly and even emailed late at night to make sure everything was perfect.

During the four-hour hearing, his quick thinking and precise objections changed the outcome more than once.

Special thanks to Miao Ling, who was patient, organized, and always supportive throughout the process.

Their professionalism and commitment made all the difference. Highly recommended to anyone looking for a truly professional and caring immigration lawyer!

I came to the U.S. in 2019 to pursue a master’s degree at a seminary. At the same time, I noticed that the environment for religious faith in my home country was worsening. Upon a friend’s recommendation, I found Attorney Wang and submitted my asylum application in August 2020.

I still vividly remember the first time I walked into his office. I asked him only one question: “Can I avoid lying?” He slammed the table and firmly said, “Of course, you must not lie.” At that moment, I knew he was the right attorney for me! My faith of over 20 years has never allowed me to speak a lie. Even though my case was not filled with bloodshed or violence, I wrote my declaration with complete honesty.

Next, Ms. Miaoling’s professional guidance and meticulous work gave me great confidence. Following her instructions, I prepared all the necessary documents and began the “long” wait. My first attempt to expedite my case in 2023 was unsuccessful. In 2024, I tried again, and finally, I was scheduled for an interview in January 2025. With the new administration taking office, everything became even more uncertain. However, I firmly believed that the God who led me to the U.S. and the professionals He provided for me would prepare the best possible outcome.

During this time, I am especially grateful to Attorney Wang. With his keen legal expertise, he quickly found the relevant laws that allowed my son to receive free tuition while studying at the University of California.

Finally, the interview day arrived. The four-hour interview completely drained me—I could only mechanically respond to all the interrogations. I felt that my performance was mediocre. But at the last moment, Attorney Gong’s professional closing statement felt like a lifeline, giving me hope again.

After what felt like an eternity of waiting, on March 8th, I finally received a letter from USCIS. The moment I tore open the envelope and saw the word “approval,” I fell to my knees at the doorway, crying out loud—thanking God for His faithfulness and feeling deeply grateful for this result.

If anyone reads my comment, I want to say: Seek the Lord Jesus—He has been searching for you for so long! Seek out Attorney Wang—he can truly help you. May God bless Attorney Wang’s work so that justice can be a help to those in need! And may everyone seeking in the U.S. find what they are looking for!

My husband finally got his immigration visa. Here is my experience. I am the green card holder and petition my husband. It has been four and half years since we applied. The interview supposed to be last year. However, due to the epidemic, there has been no news for nearly one year. Day by day with so much frustrations we heard that a friend of mine had just successfully received his green card. So I met Justin Wang via this friend’s referral. Justin filed a lawsuit to the government within three or four days after learning about the situation. Two and a half months later, my husband received an interview notice. But no visa was issued because they wanted more documents. Due to the various obstacles of the epidemic, for three months, the documents were finally submitted and a visa was issued. The thing we appreciated most is that Justin did not give up like some lawyers did when attorney from the Ministry of Justice urged him to sign and withdraw the case, saying that the result of the case was that the visa would not be granted. He insisted until my husband finally got his visa. I am very grateful to Justin Wang for his persistence. Finally we got our family reunion. I would like to share my experience here, and hope everyone will avoid detours. Justin Wang is trustworthy. Good Luck!

My story: I filed my I-485 on April, 23 2020 and had the interview on 7,23 2021..after that. I didn’t hear anything back from USCIS. Then, I tried many different ways, calling them, writing letters to USCIS, asking senators and congresswomen for help, but still those didn’t help me at all until I found attorney Justin Xiaohe Wang. 2022. Then very soon!!!!!!!! After 10 days, I finally heard them back and was told that my green card got approved (on the same day, a new card was being processed!). Baughman & Wang, Attorneys at Law office had been tremendously helpful to me, and I highly recommend them to anyone needing immigration-related services!

I applied for a green card on April 23, 2020, and had a green card interview on July 23, 2021. After that, there was no news. Various inquiries had no results. No matter how I asked, urged, or found members of Congress, there was no progress. Later, I came to visit Attorney Bauman and Lawyer Wang Xiaohe. After Lawyer Wang learned about the situation from me, he filed a case against the federal urging order and estimated that there would be a result within 60 days. After the formal submission (March 15, 2022), as expected, on the 10th day (March 25, 2022), good news finally came out and my green card was approved. This is really a miracle! After learning this good news, my family and I were really overwhelmed. My experience is that you must take real medicine when taking medicine, and you must find a great lawyer to handle the case! I am really grateful to Lawyer Wang Xiaohe.

With​ ​the​ ​help​ ​of​ ​Baughman​ ​&​ ​Wang,​ ​Attorneys​ ​at​ ​Law,​ ​I​ ​was​ ​granted​ ​asylum​ ​in November,​ ​2017.​ ​My​ ​attorney,​ ​Mr​ ​Baughman​ ​is​ ​such​ ​a​ ​detail-oriented​ ​and​ ​patient person.​ ​He​ ​answered​ ​all​ ​my​ ​questions​ ​and​ ​whenever​ ​there​ ​was​ ​any​ ​confusion,​ ​he would​ ​find​ ​different​ ​ways​ ​to​ ​explain​ ​it​ ​to​ ​me​ ​until​ ​I​ ​fully​ ​understood.​ ​Mr Baughman​ ​met​ ​with​ ​me​ ​few​ ​times​ ​before​ ​my​ ​immigration​ ​court​ ​to​ ​discuss​ ​all questions​ ​in​ ​my​ ​application,​ ​he​ ​is​ ​such​ ​a​ ​thoughtful​ ​person​ ​that​ ​even​ ​reminded​ ​me of​ ​my​ ​outfit,​ ​behaviours​ ​and​ ​wording​ ​in​ ​the​ ​court.​ ​Also​ ​he​ ​figured​ ​out​ ​that​ ​it​ ​would be​ ​a​ ​good​ ​idea​ ​for​ ​me​ ​to​ ​have​ ​some​ ​witnesses​ ​to​ ​verify​ ​my​ ​christianity​ ​in​ ​the​ ​court. Following​ ​Mr​ ​Baughman’s​ ​advice,​ ​I​ ​asked​ ​few​ ​sisters​ ​in​ ​my​ ​church​ ​to​ ​be​ ​my witness​ ​in​ ​the​ ​immigration​ ​court.​ ​Mr​ ​Baughman​ ​called​ ​all​ ​my​ ​witnesses​ ​personally and​ ​helped​ ​them​ ​to​ ​better​ ​understand​ ​my​ ​application​ ​and​ ​my​ ​purpose.​ ​Mr Baughman​ ​also​ ​answered​ ​all​ ​their​ ​questions​ ​regarding​ ​my​ ​case.​ ​As​ ​a​ ​result,​ ​the presence​ ​of​ ​witnesses​ ​was​ ​one​ ​of​ ​the​ ​most​ ​important​ ​factors​ ​that​ ​the​ ​Judge
approved​ ​my​ ​asylum​ ​request.​ ​Because​ ​my​ ​husband​ ​also​ ​applied​ ​asylum​ ​in​ ​los angeles​ ​back​ ​to​ ​2003,​ ​but​ ​he​ ​didn’t​ ​get​ ​approved​ ​yet.​ ​So​ ​Mr​ ​Baughman​ ​contacted my​ ​husband’s​ ​attorney​ ​in​ ​los​ ​angeles​ ​and​ ​discussed​ ​with​ ​him​ ​regarding​ ​my husband’s​ ​case,​ ​so​ ​Mr​ ​Baughman​ ​could​ ​figure​ ​out​ ​what​ ​was​ ​going​ ​on​ ​in​ ​my husband’s​ ​case​ ​and​ ​then​ ​make​ ​any​ ​necessary​ ​changes​ ​in​ ​my​ ​application​ ​regarding my​ ​husband’s​ ​part.​ ​All​ ​the​ ​staff​ ​in​ ​Baughman​ ​&​ ​Wang’s​ ​office​ ​are​ ​nice​ ​and patient,​ ​whenever​ ​I​ ​went​ ​to​ ​Baughman​ ​&​ ​Wang's​ ​office​ ​to​ ​discuss​ ​my​ ​case​ ​I​ ​could feel​ ​that​ ​they​ ​were​ ​trying​ ​their​ ​best​ ​to​ ​help​ ​me​ ​to​ ​succeed​ ​in​ ​the​ ​immigration​ ​court. They​ ​are​ ​such​ ​a​ ​great​ ​team​ ​that​ ​take​ ​small​ ​details​ ​into​ ​consideration​ ​to​ ​help​ ​me​ ​out. My​ ​families​ ​and​ ​me​ ​could​ ​not​ ​continue​ ​to​ ​live​ ​in​ ​the​ ​United​ ​States​ ​legally​ ​without the​ ​help​ ​of​ ​Baughman​ ​&​ ​Wang,​ ​Attorneys​ ​at​ ​Law.

While shopping at a local retail store, my foot was broken when a shelf fell from a display.  I suffered great pain and required surgery to remove the bone that was crushed when the shelf fell on it. After much back and forth, the retailer made an offer to me that I believed was not enough to compensate me for my medical and mental injury.  I reached out to Naseer at NK Law for help.  The bone that was crushed rarely happens so there is no real precedent on what the outcome would be.  Naseer and team educated themselves on the injury and remained persistent while dealing with unsympathetic, corporate attorneys who made it clear they would not budge on their original offer.  He explained the process throughout each phase leading up to our arbitration meeting with the retailer.  Patience prevailed and I wound up reaching a settlement that was far better than had I not chosen NK Law to represent me.

I give Naseer a thumbs up and would highly recommend him.

Naseer was very communicative, helpful, and made the process of getting my settlement as headache free as possible.

What: Accident back in January deemed not at fault for both parties by police report. Got mail in the letter from my insurance stating I was not at fault.

About a month later they tell me they cashed out the other party from my policy. I ask why and gave me terrible/dodgy explanations about how their injuries were too significant. I had significant injuries too! I inquired and of course insurance was not willing to give me anything and were extremely dodgy. Had enough of that noise and don't have time to spare with dodgy insurance negotiations.

The situation was too ridiculous to not get a lawyer. I looked around for attorney/lawyer next few days and then I found Naseer. I gave him the information about the situation and said it was likely to be in our favor. Fast forward to this month got a solid settlement higher than our initial offering a few months prior. Definitely do not regret the decision!

Thank you Naseer / NK Law Group.

It would be a wise thing to trust and take her service as she  works with complete dedication and takes ultimate care of her clients case. she gives 100% efforts to bring success to her clients. I had worked with Merchant law firm from time to time on various issues related to family law and immigration. They have always been prompt and very helpful to find a desired solution! I worked with attorney name Asma Bashir and found her highly responsive and professional. I would highly recommend their services!

Please see my previous reviews. I received ANOTHER bill from Seabrook Law Offices today.

Seabrook Law Offices,
At this point, it feels like your firm is punishing me—sending me one false charge after another for mistakes that never should have happened had Gabriella and Pamela done their jobs with even basic diligence. I asked for help repeatedly. I pleaded. And instead of help, I received silence… and now bills.

This isn’t just negligence anymore. It’s cruel.

Paul, I sat across from you, vulnerable and terrified, and you looked me in the eyes and told me I was safe. You told me I had the right people behind me. You handed your phone to my daughter to watch Ice Age so we could keep talking. You knew I was desperate. I scraped together the money that very afternoon because I believed in you. I believed you would protect us.

Gabriella, you shared your stories with me. I truly thought you understood. I thought you would stand with me through the worst of it. Instead, the moment things got hard with my husband, you gave up on me, on my case, on my daughter.

Pamela, you and I agreed: If I could pay $2,000 per month, I’d remain in good standing. But I paid $4,800, and still, you walked away. You left me hanging—withheld my files for a full month, even after I begged again and again and again.

You both saw the videos and you read the accounts of my husband's abuses. You saw me fall apart in your office, terrified that I would lose my three-year-old child. And still, I’m not just fighting him… Now I’m fighting you.

The microcharges you keep sending me feel less like clerical errors and more like punishment. Retaliation. Some twisted reminder that I’m alone in this. You called me, said you wanted to make it right, but nothing happened. No correction, no closure. Just another bill.

You owe me $280 for services I never received and should never have been charged for. I want that money returned, and I ask—no, I insist—that you stop billing me for these inappropriate charges.

The truth is, you never cared. And you never will.

I hope your next client—another desperate mother, another victim—gets the commitment, the integrity, the compassion I was promised and never received.

Disappointed. Heartbroken. Disgusted.

FORMAL COMPLAINT & WARNING TO OTHERS

I am reporting Seabrook Law Offices and my former attorneys to the California State Bar Association.

This firm lost a $4,000 payment made on my behalf, then pressured me into signing a Substitution of Attorney based on the false claim that the payment was never made. I was later billed for unnecessary and unauthorized services. They also refused—despite multiple requests—for weeks to return my documents and case file.

UPDATE:
A client liaison contacted me and asked if refunding the $4,000 would resolve the matter. I explained that I am seeking a full refund, including my original retainer, due to the firm’s serious mishandling of my case. Their own leadership admitted that my attorney failed to exercise due diligence. I was told they would speak with Paul Seabrook. Instead, I received a $314 invoice for a court filing that was rejected, with no explanation or accountability.

While some clients may have had smooth, uncontested matters, this firm is unfit for complex or high-conflict family law, especially cases involving abuse or narcissistic ex-partners. They ignored clear red flags, took my money, and left me unprotected—forcing me to find new representation and start over.

I met with Paul Seabrook, shared years of abuse my children and I endured, and was promised support. That promise was empty. The firm failed me at every stage. My concerns were ignored, and I was left to appear in court with inaccurate information, which harmed my credibility and case.

They also violated California Rule of Professional Conduct 1.16(e)(1), which requires attorneys to return all client materials upon termination:

“...a lawyer shall, promptly upon the termination of a representation, release to the client, at the request of the client, all client materials and property.”

This firm demonstrated negligence, dishonesty, and a disturbing disregard for vulnerable clients. If you're escaping abuse or navigating a difficult divorce, do not hire them. They are not trauma-informed, not diligent, and will not support you when it matters most.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION.

Working with Jay & his team made the probate process stress-free for me & my family ...Imagine, still mourning & at the same time needed to deal with my brother's estate...I was at a lost when Jay was explaining to me as everything was foreign to me...Everyone was so helpful  & knowledgeable , especially Andrea... She guided & walked me through the complicated process... I live in AZ but that wasn't a big issue 'cause Jay represented me well in court...Jay & his staff were all focused & attentive to our needs...I also would like a special mention to Pete, who helped us set-up Dad's living trust so we don't have to do probate again...He explained everything in simple & clear words...Thank you, everyone...

We couldn't be happier with Jay and the team at LifePlan Lawyer. They thoroughly explained every aspect of the process. They offer a comprehensive approach and made us feel comfortable at every step. The binder they put together and follow up videos provide clear instructions. The whole experience was a pleasure for something that seemed overwhelming before working with this team.
We would highly recommend LifePlan Lawyer

Jay, Debbie, and the LifePlan team went above and beyond to help me create a living trust. Jay is very knowledgeable and patient. I appreciated the time he took to explain every step in the process as well as alerting me to the various situations/scenarios which I hadn't considered. Working with Jay was a great experience overall and I would highly recommend him to others.

The team at Lifeplan Lawyer is truly exceptional. From start to finish, the entire process was professional, warm, and seamless. Jay and Debbie were fantastic to work with, knowledgeable, patient, and incredibly supportive throughout every step. They made what could have been an overwhelming experience feel straightforward and stress free. I am genuinely grateful for their guidance and will absolutely recommend Lifeplan Lawyer to anyone in need of estate planning or legal services. I will be forever grateful for their help.

My wife and I wanted to set up an estate plan of some sort, and we were referred to Jay Roadarmel and his LifePlan Lawyer, PC team.  The guidance and services they provided were outstanding.  Jay started by making sure we understood our options and the pros and cons.  Then once a direction was chosen (a Living Trust), he expertly guided us through the process of establishing it.  Everything went smoothly from start to finish with new trust documents ready for filing within two weeks.  He was easy and fun to work with and seemed to understand that the Law often used a lingo foreign to us mere mortals.  Lastly, while not part of his "contracted" service, I'm particularly grateful that he will remain available to help Successor Trustees understand and implement the Trust's tenants when that time comes.  Thank you Jay.  We sure made the right choice.
Our experience being guided through the trust process with Jay and his staff is one we look back on with great satisfaction.  Absolutely stellar service - Charlie and Rene Brucker

Jay and team were great. They walked my wife and I through the process of setting up our living trust and it really is a big relief knowing our family is taken care of if something were to happen to us.

Dear Jay, Debbie, Peter and Staff,

I wanted to express my sincere appreciation for your excellent work in creating my trust. I was particularly impressed with how thoroughly you addressed aspects like health directives, which I hadn't even considered.

Recently, I got married and needed to make some changes to my trust. The process was once again quick, easy, and affordable, which I truly appreciate.

I highly recommend your services to anyone seeking peace of mind for themselves and their families.

Sincerely,
Kevin

We reached out to Jay on behalf of an elderly family member for what we thought would be a simple task. Although fairly simple, it turned out to be a costly task for someone on a senior income, so instead of taking the job, Jay referred us to someone who could handle what we needed at a much more affordable price.

He could have easily taken our money without offering an alternate solution, but he didn’t.  He put our family member’s needs first and made sure they had an affordable solution. Rare to find someone so considerate and trustworthy—highly recommend Jay!

We first worked with Jay at LifePlan Lawyer in early 2018 to create our initial estate plan. Jay, Debbie, and the entire team were extremely professional and took the time to explain everything clearly as we went through the estate plan and healthcare directives.

In July 2025, we needed to amend our estate plan, and this time we had the pleasure of working with Pete. He was just as thorough and professional, making the process smooth and stress-free.

Every interaction we’ve had with LifePlan Lawyer has been marked by professionalism, courtesy, and clear communication. We have happily recommended Jay and his team to family and friends, and we know exactly who we’ll turn to if we ever need to update our plan again in the future.

I reached out to Life Plan Lawyers for help drafting Will documents for my parents, and Pete Hatz was assigned to our case. From our very first conversation, I explained my parents exact wishes and emphasized the urgency due to one of my parents serious health conditions. Pete assured me that he understood and could help us achieve what we needed.

We completed the necessary paperwork and had an introductory meeting with Pete, where we spent about an hour answering his questions. He explained the next steps and said he would work on the documents after returning from a vacation. I patiently waited, emailing him several times over the next couple of weeks with no response. After a few weeks passed from our first conversation before he finally replied only to inform us that he would no longer be helping us and recommended we seek another attorney.

What was most upsetting was the reasoning he gave an assumption that there may be some third party undue influence on my parents decisions. To be judged like this was insulting to me and my family, and most importantly, it cost us precious weeks we can never get back. I made it very clear from the beginning how urgent this was, yet the decision to refuse services came after more than a month .

I fully understand an attorney has the right to decline representation. My issue is with the way it was handled the lack of communication, the delay, and the complete disregard for the urgency of our situation. This experience was incredibly stressful, especially as one of my parents is currently hospitalized, and now I am forced to start over with a new attorney.

I was referred to Life Plan Lawyers, but based on how we were treated and how much time was wasted, I cannot recommend them. This was my personal experience with Pete Hatz.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are sorry that this engagement did not work out, especially given our clients’ health concerns. We have no doubt that Fawad was sincerely trying to help his parents; however, after being unable to speak with our clients (Fawad’s parents) alone and without Fawad, we needed to disengage.

Our firm was contacted by Fawad to create an estate plan for his parents. My staff set up an initial consultation call which Fawad missed. A second consult was arranged the following week which Fawad also missed. In our third (and successful) initial consultation, it was explained to Fawad that while we understand him helping his parents with the administrative steps of setting up our meetings, the actual meetings and discussions themselves should remain between just his parents and the attorney. As indicated by the word “we” in the review, Fawad assisted in preparing the paperwork and then participated in the planning meeting.

Following our planning meeting, Fawad emailed us that he and his parents would like to set up a follow up call upon my return from vacation to ask some questions and change some of their intended plan. Our staff called Fawad three times over six days to try and arrange this discussion.

When we were able to schedule this meeting, it was then missed by our clients. The next day, the proposed changes were emailed to us, by Fawad. I unsuccessfully attempted to contact my clients directly three times to ensure we had their wishes correct and to arrange a private discussion with them. Being unable to do so, we made the unfortunate but necessary decision to disengage. When doing so, we provided the name of a two Elder Law attorneys and clarified that there was no cost to our client for the work provided.

reviews.text: My husband and I had an excellent experience working with Jay and his team to create our estate plan. We found Jay thanks to glowing reviews from friends who had worked with him, and they were right to spread the word. Jay was very prepared and professional. The forms and videos he has created do a great job of preparing you for the process, and he spends a lot of time going through all of the initial decisions and final forms with you to make sure you understand everything. We had previously started this process with a different lawyer and it was not a good experience, so that really highlighted for us how smooth and easy it was to work with Jay. Thanks, Jay!

JAY and his team are awesome. It’s so important that you carefully plan for the end of your life.  I had a 30-year-old trust.  Times have changed.  JAY and his expertise will ensure that your wishes and desires are met when you pass.  I had the good fortune of camping with JAY and his family many years ago.   It’s nice to do business with someone you know and trust.  JAY‘s wife is an important member of his team.  She will ensure that I do my homework!  Watch JAY‘s video on his website. Sign up for his free consultation.  You will find the expertise you need.

This review is posted on behalf of my Mom for the team at LifePlan Lawyer in Pleasanton.  Jay is a very professional lawyer and a professional photographer as well. His expertise from the beginning making us very comfortable to work with. When Pete later comes along to update, his knowledge, responsive and patience make the process finish up smoothly. We highly recommend Jay and team for put together a living trust.

We had our trust and will created by Pete and the LifePlan team. The process was so smooth and white-glove. The process can be garbage-in-garbage-out, but they made it so easy to provide all the right information and asked questions to get us thinking about situations that we might want to cover. In total, it was 3 phone calls and one in-person signing session. The quality of the final product is amazing. There is a nice binder with all the info we or anyone (unfortunately) receiving the binder after our passing would need to administer the trust. They also made it easy to put the assets into the trust (which an important and oft-forgotten step!). Highly recommend.
We've had our trust done and amended by Jay. Him, his wife Deborah and their team did a great job, they listened and walked us through the process, highly recommend them

Creating our living trust was a pleasant experience. The process was seamless and efficient from start to finish, and we felt well-informed and supported every step of the way.

What we liked best about working with Pete was his knowledge, patience, and attention to detail. He took the time to explain legal terms in a way that was easy for us to understand and was always attentive to our specific needs. Pete made sure we felt comfortable and well-informed throughout the entire process. He was easy to talk to and welcomed our questions, providing clear, thoughtful answers every time.

LIFEPLAN LAWYER PC  team is professional, knowledgeable, and committed to making the process clear and stress-free. With their attentive service and thorough approach, you're in excellent hands.

My wife and I had our trust and wills revised by Jay at LifePlan Lawyer.  The experience and results were excellent.  Jay explained everything very thoroughly, and pointed out some additional elements to consider.

We never felt rushed in the slightest, as his thorough and personable manner put us at ease and made us feel as if we had a legal ally.

Even more impressive to me was that he consulted with me, at no cost, on a completely different trust topic.  This was years after he completed our original work, and yet he did not bill us.

Go ahead and contact this team; you won't regret it.

A friend referred me to LifePlan Lawyer in regard to my Trust.  My contact was a positive one.  LifePlan Lawyer was very thorough with the information, guidance and work they provided.  It was a good decision to work with them.

I had a challenging and unique probate case that involved death abroad and divorce. LifePlan Lawyer was recommended to me by another legal professional with whom my mother had a good experience. From the first phone call with Jay, I could tell (from my own advance research..as I initially was going to try doing the probate myself) that he was giving me honest advice and prioritizing my best interests. That feeling never changed throughout the whole process. Andrea and Daphney were very responsive to my many questions and always advocated effectively on my behalf with the various banks involved. Jay came up with several creative solutions to unique issues in my case, even ones that actually reduced his fee. I would wholeheartedly recommend this practice!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the very kind probate review! We all enjoyed working with you!

Personal service.  Excellent responsiveness.  Flexibility to work with me from another country.  I can recommend Jay, Debbie and Pete to anyone interested in personalized estate planning.

My husband and I needed our trust to be amended.  We found LifePlan Lawyer through google search and chose them among other estate lawyers in the TriValley area.

We were very pleased with their work.  Pete explained everything very clearly to us.  Gave us options and , where appropriate, offered recommendations.  The entire process was quick, low stress, and efficient. We're using them again for my mother's trust, and would highly recommend them to our family and friends.
Great experience working with the Lifeplan team. Professional, courteous and very thorough throughout the living trust process.

I would like  to thank Jay and Debbie for all their help with my estate planning.   This was all very new to me and not only helpful but seemed to anticipate any questions I had. We have found Jay and his team to be knowledgable and very helpful. We appreciate their attentive listening and support.

Finally, they provide a binder with all the documents and a flash drive with copies of everything for storage in a secure location.
Jay has provided us with complete peace of mind that the trust will enable the seamless transfer of our estate to our heirs - thanks, Jay and team!

Jay and his team are phenomenal!  Jay did a fabulous job on our personal trust!  When my mom passed away, Jay came aboard to navigate my mother's trust mid-stream. Jay, Debbie, and Daphney were so kind, patient, and knowledgeable during this process and I will be forever grateful to them.  Jay is superb and I give LifePlan Lawyer my utmost highest recommendation.

LifePlan Lawyer, and the quality of services provided by their team, is exceptional, professional, and deeply empathetic.  They take the hardest questions in life and make them straightforward and manageable.  I couldn't praise their work and kindness enough.

We were referred to Jay and his team of estate planning professionals and I can't say enough good things about the experience. Please consider LifePlan Lawyer when you are ready to take the next step in planning for your future.

Just like my first experience, everything was done in a way that made the process easy to understand, with great attention to detail and very professional. Doing our own trust was a different process than administrating my brother’s, but they were excellent and great to work with in each case.

Jay and Debbie were fantastic guiding me through administrating the trust.
It is a true small family business with real personal attention in every detail.
They are also very thoughtful and great to work with. I highly recommend them and I rarely write reviews.

This family run business is amazing!!!  We needed estate planning within 3 weeks and from the moment I connected with Andrea,  to working with Pete and Debora, the process was smooth and seamless.  They went above and beyond to fit us into their busy schedule and we are so very grateful!  Pete is a great lawyer and explained everything we needed to understand.  Not only do they prepare the documents for you but they also give you next steps on how to “fund” your account immediately now, and in the future.  Everything you need in writing as well as on a thumb drive. Excellent service from beginning to end!

We are very grateful to have found Jay Roadarmel and his LifePlan Lawyer Team and were more than satisfied with their professionalism and knowledge.  Jay walked my husband and I through the process of creating a Living Trust, Healthcare Directive, and Pour-Over Will, patiently answering our questions and making things easy to understand.  He kept us on task and the whole process from start to finish was only a couple of weeks and it has now given us the peace of mind that our family will avoid costly probate fees and that our assets will transfer to our family with ease.  Jay and his wife, Debbie, are great people and they make the process easy with online meetings and a very efficient in-person signing.  We went for a bite to eat locally and then picked up our very nice binder with all documents organized only about 45 mins after signing.  To top it off, Jay took a photo of us as his gift to us.  I would definitely recommend Jay and the Lifeplan Lawyer Team to anyone looking for honest, professional, efficient and very personable legal advice.  Jay and his team are a cut above the rest and his fees are reasonable too - you won't be disappointed.

I would like to thank Daphney and her team for the above and beyond they have done for us.

Regardless the discovery that Daphney's team does not do our case, Daphney not only let us know the options we have but also provide directions on each of them.

There has rarely been anyone else who does not do our case was able to help us as much as Daphney did.

Thank you for being our light Daphney!!! We were in complete darkness and finally has a direction to head to.
Jay and Debbie Roadarmil do a fantastic job. Kind, patient, and highly effective. Let's face it, family politics can be rough. They truly take the pain out of this part.
We feel so grateful to have met Jay, Debbie, and his team. He is detailed, knowledgeable, and caring. We felt like we knew him forever. Thank you.
Jay is extremely detailed and made us feel very comfortable and helped us understanding every aspect of the life plan he and his team put together.

Jay and his team were incredibly kind, helpful, and knowledgable. They quickly and efficiently helped my husband and I create and establish our trust, will, and a few other documents. I highly recommend anyone to work with Jay!

Jay and his team helped us restate my mother's trust this year to be better in line with her wishes and to be better in line with current tax law.
The service we received was excellent.
Now Jay and Debbie are helping me through the disposition of my mother's estate. They have been absolutely wonderful.

Good that i talked to Jay about couple of months ago.  I have been deferring this, thinking it is a big tedious process.  From the day i reached out Jay's office, i becomes easier and easier process, every step of the way.

Starting from the introduction video, and the service Jay will be offering and what does it mean for me, personally.  And, then the video call, where Jay provided all the details and taken our input.  Jay was very professional, and listened to concerns and explained to us and provided the solution, in a way that we could understand.
And, a timely follow up, and get the process done, with almost no additional from myside.

It was a very pleasant experience with Jay & his organization, and it was not tedious process after all.

Thank you Jay.

I spent a lot of time researching a law firm for estate planning. Jay was highly rated and now we can see why. He is a demonstrated expert on CA estate laws and was exceptionally thorough in putting together our complete estate package (trust, healthcare directive, pour-over will, etc.). Jay, Debbie, and the staff are warm, nice people and our process from start to signature ran like clockwork. Their COVID precautions for our signature day made us feel very safe.  I highly recommend this firm.

We were able to get our trust updated in the midst of the Covid 19 mess without any issues.  We felt it was done in the safest way possible.  Jay and Debbie were very helpful and accommodating to our needs.   The process was patiently explained to us in detail.  We required a special request with how our house was handled and Jay was able to accommodate us.  I would not hesitate to recommend their estate planning services.
I was referred by a friend to contact Mr. Knutsen and I am so happy I did! He rest assured some of my pre-divorce questions that I had…Thank you Mr. Knutsen…
Represented by  Tom Knutsen a few times. BEST LAWYER IN THE BAY FOR SURE! I won't walk into a court room without him. Affordable too. Highly recommend.

I've used Mr. Knutsen twice both times with excellent results.  First was a significant personal civil case.  He was Spot on in everything.  When i went to the police on a subject the officer saw his name and told me i had an 'Great Lawyer".  I was pleased as i could be in what was not a pleasant experience,

Later i had Mr. Knutsen represent me on a Bogus insurance claim.  In one letter it went away permanently.  Minimum with no fuss.

UPDATE: Someone who takes full responsibility and acknowledges when they are wrong definitely earns my trust. That's why moving forward, we will definitely be using Ms. Snyder and changing my stars to a 5.

Before the last review 4 months ago, it had been 6 YEARS since the last review and I see why now. VERY UNPROFESSIONAL. Don't waste your time or energy.
reviews.ownerResponse: I agree with Ms. Williams. After good communication during the intake process, I dropped the ball and did not respond to a couple of her emails. This occurred during a specific critical time while I was preparing for an imminent trial and spread really thin. This review is authentic and deserved. To potential clients reading this, I promise you that customer service is really, really personally important to me.  But also, there will be times when a delayed response will be unavoidable. Jennifer

Yes this is my attorney as she's great very polite very helpful and I think her very very much!

TERRIBLE TERRIBLE TERRIBLE!! Plz stay away! Do not go to him just because he is Afghan. This man took our money, delayed our case, and was extremely unresponsive. He will show for consultation, convince you he can process your case and when the embassy request paperwork he will not respond to them or tell you what’s going on. Our work has been pending for 4+ years because of this man. Be aware and do your research. I was gullible you shouldn’t be. He will steal your time and money.

I can’t thank Salim enough for his work on my unique civil litigation case. From the very start, he believed in me and took the time to understand my situation fully. Salim not only provided expert guidance but also turned everything around in a way I could never have imagined. His dedication and skill made all the difference, and I am truly indebted to him for the impact he’s had on my life. If you’re in need of a compassionate and skilled attorney, look no further – Salim is the best you could ask for.
That was great
He is excellent

I recently wrapped up a divorce case with Bob.  I highly recommend him if you are going through a divorce.  1. He is very responsive.  I know I will get an answer to my questions, emails, calls in a timely manner.  2. His rates are reasonable. I shopped around for attorneys and some wanted an exorbitant rate just to have an initial phone conversation.  I felt all of Bob's fees were fair.  3.  He has a friendly demeanor.  When going through an emotional time it is such a relief to deal with a attorney who is just a nice person.  4. He is highly knowledgeable, straightforward and clear. He explained to me during our initial meeting exactly how the proceedings would go for my unique case and even created a step-by-step guide.  True to his word, everything went just as he had explained.  If you need a divorce attorney, look no further!

I contacted Bob Lynn. I was deeply impressed by his professionalism, integrity, and attention to detail. He exceeded all expectations. I greatly appreciate his time and support. He advised me not to hire his services at this time and provided the next steps. I would definitely consider working with this firm in the future if necessary. Thank you, Bob!

I had the privilege of working with Bob in 2007 during a very difficult time in my life. I was going through a divorce with no family around to support me, and Bob not only guided me through the legal process with expertise, but also provided genuine support and care when I needed it most. His professionalism, responsiveness, and deep understanding of family law made a world of difference. Even years later, in 2025, when I needed a copy of my divorce paperwork, his office staff responded quickly and efficiently. That level of long-term service says so much about the kind of practice he runs. Over the years, I've referred couple people to Bob, and they've all shared how satisfied and confident they felt working with him. Whenever I have any legal needs--even outside of divorce or family law--I reach out to Bob, and he always provides trustworthy and helpful referrals to other attorneys. He's someone you can count on--responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring. I highly recommend Bob for anyone looking for a top-notch divorce or family law attorney.

His support staff was equally impressive—efficient, professional, and quick to respond. Thanks to Bob and his team, our divorce was finalized within six months.

I’ve already recommended Bob to several close friends, and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to anyone needing legal guidance in a divorce. His expertise, approachability, and professionalism truly set him apart.

reviews.text: Harvey is not only very helpful but also genuinely caring and supportive. He made me feel confident that I was in good hands.

I recently consulted Mr. Ziff regarding a very difficult situation involving my son's car accident. Mr. Ziff took the time to truly understand the details and provided calm, clear, and professional advice at a time when I felt overwhelmed and uncertain.

He explained my potential civil liabilities in a way that was easy to understand, and most importantly, he assured me that my exposure was limited — which allowed me to finally breathe easier. Mr. Ziff's experience and empathy really stood out. He didn’t pressure me or push services; he just gave me the straight answers I needed.

If you’re looking for an injury lawyer who combines legal expertise with human decency, Harvey Ziff is the person you want in your corner. I can’t recommend him highly enough!

I was referred to the firm by a friend who is an attorney. Harvey Ziff considered my case, advised that I not attempt a suit, fully explaining why. I am entirely pleased and satisfied with his counsel and would recommend the firm to anyone in need.

I encountered a car accident early this year and contacted Harvey according to the recommendation from my employer's legal service. I feel lucky for reaching out to the correct lawyer for my case, as Harvey is a patient, professional yet easy-going with lawyer. We have been working together for about half year, and he always gave me clear instructions on what to do and what to collect for my case.

With his support, my claim to the other party's insurance company got a great result which aligns or even exceeds my expectation. I really appreciate Harvey's help and would highly recommend anyone who needs personal injury help to contact him.
Ziff is knowledgeable and he always had my back. Communication was great and he was able to maximize the settlement. Glad I went with Ziff and Cohn.

If you have a personal injury regarding liability and legal counsel, I strongly recommend you contact the law firm of Ziff & Cohn.  Let me repeat.  I STRONGLY RECOMMEND you contact Ziff & Cohn.

Solely based upon office proximity and great reviews, I contacted Ziff & Cohn when I sustained an injury that I felt could've been avoided if not for the irresponsibility of the other party.  I am so thankful I made that call.

They are experienced, knowledgeable, professional and personable.  I appreciated their honest and realistic assessment of my case and their guidance every step of the way.  They always kept me informed and always returned my calls and emails in a timely manner.  Having someone use their skills and expertise to represent me, and fight for me, within the legal system was a remarkable experience.  I could not be happier with their representation and the final settlement.

You'll be doing yourself a favor when you call Ziff & Cohn!

In 2018 my car was t-boned by a driver running a red light. Subsequently, I had back surgery. Several attorneys turned down my case. For this I'm thankful because that's how I found Harvey Ziff . He immediately took charge and told me what info he needed. He got a quick settlement from the other driver's insurance company for the maximum they insured. Not being satisfied, Harvey turned his attention to my insurance company for "underinsured driver" coverage. His aggressive but polite pressure on them resulted in a very satisfactory final settlement in a short time. I could not recommend Ziff & Cohn more highly.

I got into my very first accident in January of 2020. I contacted Harvey for some guidance and I couldn't have made a better choice. His daughter Adrienne assisted in my case and helped me with every little detail. I loved how much communication there was and they let me know everything they were doing with my case. This was my first time contacting a lawyer for a car accident and it went so smoothly. Adrienne and Harvey, I can not thank you both enough. Such professionalism and kindness when working with you. Thank you.

Harvey and Adrienne are amazing. They helped me obtain resolution on my matter, even in the midst of Covid. I highly recommend their services. If you need a PI lawyer, you'll be in great hands with them!

I was referred to Ziff & Cohn and what a remarkable effort they made to smoothly handle an accident claim. I first worked with Harvey Ziff then Adrienne Cohn and recommend them for any concerns regarding similar issues.  You need someone like them to handle the intricacies of claims with a calm and professional demeanor.

Based on online recommendations, I went to Ziff & Cohn to get help on an injury accident I was involved in. I manly dealt with Adrienne Cohn and cannot commend her enough for the help she provided.  She was very personable, attentive, sharp, and her services were easily worth the price. She reached a very fair settlement with the insurance company and kept me updated on all the happenings every step of the way.  I highly recommend this firm and especially Adrienne.

I had a positive experience working with Harvey Ziff.  After consulting with him over the phone and e-mail, we agreed that in my circumstances I was better off not hiring him to represent me.  Instead, he provided me feedback and advice on how I ought to approach the negotiation with the insurance company.  Based upon this advice, I engaged the claims representative with confidence and obtained a better settlement than I might have without the benefit of Mr. Ziff's guidance.

I was recently represented by Ziff and Cohn, personal injury attorneys in Los Altos, CA.  I cannot thank them enough for the professional manner in which they handled my injury case. Their expertise and years of experience helped to obtain excellent results. In addition, they kept me abreast and guided me during the entire process. Harvey and Adrienne went the extra mile and got the parties to go the extra mile as well.

A happy and appreciative client,
Luis M. Yanez

I cannot recommend Ziff and Cohn highly enough.
After my accident - I spoke with multiple lawyers and I am glad that I went with Ziff and Cohn. They were very considerate about my injury and walked and guided me through the entire process of the litigation. They made sure that I focused on my injury prior to anything else and made the process very simple for me.
Adrienne took care of the entire process for me and made sure that I got the best settlement for my case.
If your ever in an injury- please contact Ziff and Cohn for the best service and legal help.

Adrienne was an immense help after I was hit on my motorcycle by a driver running a stop sign. Both her and Harvey were professional, honest and aligned with my goals for how to proceed.

I was incredibly impressed by how friendly and personal Adrienne was throughout my litigation process, given that it was my first time needing a lawyer this left quite an impression on me - I will w/o a doubt recommend her to my friends should they need a good personal injury attorney.
Very knowledgeable, helpful and to the point!

Adrienne and Harvey helped me to get a large cash settlement from a car accident that other attorneys would not touch. Their dedication and professionalism is beyond anything I've ever experienced despite many years in business and many dealings with other lawyers.

If you are looking for caring, thoughtful, hard-working lawyers who will fight for you and your rights, don't look any further, call Ziff and Cohn.

Harvey and Adrienne are absolutely top notch personal injury attorneys. I was hit by a car while biking to work one morning and lost consciousness, but I didn't think the accident was serious enough for it to be worth contacting a lawyer. About a month after the accident, having finally convinced myself that a lawyer might not be a bad idea, I placed a phone call to Ziff & Cohn. Within minutes I was speaking to Harvey directly. After discussing the details of my accident, he assured me that I had a strong case that would be worth pursuing. Sure enough, here I am today walking away with great settlement package, and it's all thanks to them. My case was fairly unusual for a number of reasons, and although it took some time, they knew exactly what to do to get me the best settlement possible. There was no retainer fee, and they took only a very modest cut of the settlement money. They were very responsive throughout the whole process, and were always available by phone and email. Overall, I'm extremely satisfied with the way they handled my case, and I honestly don't think there could have been any better outcome than the one they helped me get.

Awesome lawyers who put effort into supporting their clients very responsive with emails and phone calls harvey and adrienne follow through on their words and you will be happy to have them represent you

American Visa is a wonderful team ! , all the team works their hardest for you , and will be there and answer all your questions ! thanks to the American Visa Law group everything has been going really fast on my U VISA. ! I appreciate Tina for her kind words and dedication!
YOU GUYS SHOULD HIRE THEM AS YOUR ATTORNEYS. ! 10/10.

Mark represented us, alongside with Sylvia.  They were both persistent in the process, answered all our questions and helped us prep for our interview. Received our greencard way faster then expected (aprx 7 months).  Writing this review from the airport terminal, green card in hand, as we are on our way to Tokyo Japan!  Thanks for all the help guys 🤙

Lawyer Hasan Abdullah and his team helped me getting approved my H1B visa. His knowledge was on point while suggesting me a visa category that worked for my case.

He is on time while answering your questions. Also, suggests healthy solutions for your issues and responds well even to questions unrelated to his area of expertise. He is quite professional in his approach.

I would definitely recommend his firm for anyone attempting their visa approval.
They are very detailed oriented in terms of what are required documents and they also are very through in reviewing every details. Very responsive
Great experience working with team. Everyone is so supportive, quick to respond and always helpful to resolve questions aa fast as possible. 😊
amazing service and quick reply

Hasan and Tina were extremely professional and helpful throughout my process. Huge shout out specifically to Tina- she helped me navigate even the silliest of questions. She was extremely thorough on every detail and went above and beyond to help. My partner and I also greatly appropriated Hasan’s promptness and willingness to answer every question in my head. Definitely recommend the team for those looking to navigate immigration.

I had a fantastic experience with this firm for my wife's Change of Status to F-1 visa. The entire process was handled with great professionalism, and to my surprise, the COS was approved within just 7 days through premium processing!

A huge thank you to Tina, who truly made the difference. She was incredibly helpful, approachable, and pleasant to work with. She patiently answered all my questions—even the ones I thought were silly—and never made me feel rushed or ignored. Her quick responses and supportive attitude gave me a lot of confidence throughout the process.

If you’re looking for a law firm that’s efficient, knowledgeable, and actually cares about your case, I highly recommend this one. They made a complicated process feel simple and stress-free.

This firm struck a good balance of good reviews and good cost and I decided to go with them and I am glad I did.

Thanks guys. Kudos and cheers!!

reviews.text: Very bad service,  they let me fill up the form with the help of the legal assistant without even reviewing to see by the lawyer to see if I had any mistake ( neither me nor the legal assistant are attorneys so for sure there is a possibility of error but the layer task is to review it/ ask me when he doubt about something wrong , correct me), until I had an appointment with another Lawyer that reviewed my case and in one minute only he was able to point to many mistakes I had them because my mis-understanding for these questions so I sent a correction letter to USCIS , they don't even follow up the case status, I think we pay to get a service from the lawyer not from the legal assistant otherwise I could have gone to any paralegal to fill up the forms if I don't need legal advice.
reviews.ownerResponse:
In this case, the issues you bring up were based on misunderstandings of the questionnaire. When a client is unsure about a question or feels something is unclear, we do rely on them to let us know so we can clarify it together. That was not communicated to us, despite channels of communication being open and us being responsive.

The good news is that the corrections you’re referring to can be made post-filing and not critical to the successful outcome. Our priority is always to ensure that nothing irreconcilable or harmful goes into a petition, and in this case it appears we achieved that.

He did an excellent job reviewing my recommendation letters and personal essay, providing precise edits and suggestions to enhance the quality of the documents. Moreover, he crafted an impactful cover letter that summarized how my profile aligns with each of the 3 prongs of the National Interest Waiver.

In addition to his expertise, Ali exudes an easygoing demeanor with a friendly vibe. During our phone calls and email exchanges, he remained calm and patiently answered all my questions. His positive attitude and solution-oriented approach significantly boosted my confidence in receiving approval.

I definitely recommend American Visa Law Group, LLC for immigration-related matters. They comprise a team of seasoned experts with a successful track record across a wide range of immigration topics. I am truly grateful to have had the opportunity to work with American Visa Law Group, LLC!

reviews.text: Great guy! Handled my case quickly and efficiently. Gave me great peace of mind knowing he could help me in my situation and not put any more stress on me or my family.

Although I do not doubt he has handled many cases like mine, he treated my scenario with precision and motivation.  Sean made it easy to establish trust and confidence in his skills.  He remained very professional, accurate, understanding, and approachable.  Although he said he was just doing his job, I definitely feel like he went above and beyond to assist me.

The Law Office of Sean M. O’Neill was referred to me by a family friend when my father passed away. This was a very sensitive time for me, and I needed someone I could trust to handle the probate matters. Honestly,  I would've never been able to figure out the confusing matters around the estate, estate tax filings, court orders, 401k, life insurance, and everything that entails a probate case without his guidance.  Mr. O'Neill carefully walked me through each step of the probate process, explained in detail what we needed to do, and quickly and competently executed on each step of the probate process.  I highly recommend the services of Sean O'Neill if you're ever in a similar situation.

After doing such a wonderful job, I am now having him establish a Trust, 'm also having him establish a Living Trust, not to mention the paperwork involved in finalizing a divorce... Ill update once finished; but the so far he is holding to the same pattern as before. Quick, Concise, informative.

.  Thank You Sean.

Sean assisted me with a transactional matter, as well as assisting me in the purchase of a new home. He was able to explain the nuances of the transaction and the home purchase in a way that made it easy for me to understand and make informed decisions. He was very flexible and willing to meet on evenings and weekends if something came up. Throughout, he was very professional, knowledgeable, and easy to get along with. I highly recommend Sean O'Neill and will be referring him to all friends/family in need of legal services.

Not long ago, I had my car towed from my apartment complex's parking lot and had to pay an unusually high fee to the towing company regardless of the fact that I lived there. Since I didn't feel that what happened was just, I quickly contacted Sean O'Neill.

Sean provided quick, excellent answers to my questions regarding towing company fees. As soon as I wanted to know how much the towing company could legally charge me even under special circumstances, Sean was able to tell me how towing company fees were set and what I could do about it all by text message on the same day. All follow-up questions were answered just as quickly and professionally.

I highly recommend Mr. O'Neill's legal services and would love to do business with him if I'm ever in need of counsel again.

reviews.text:
Calling a lawyer was something that I never wanted to do in life. But that wasn’t really an option after getting hit head on by an SUV a few days after thanksgiving. I was aware and riding within my limits which saved me, but that quick action would have not been necessary if the other drive would have just been looking at the road. I remember trying to stop while to steer way from the oncoming traffic. In a split second I had to decided if I wanted to go over her car or into the side of it. I went towards the right and when I knew it was a wrap I jumped. I woke up on the hood of her car. I may have never called if the driver apologized, but that wasn’t even on the table.

From the moment I spokes to the Russ Brown team, I felt like things were going to be all right. Someone who understood what it meant to be rider could see how blatant that incident was. Thank you to Dan for making the whole process painless. Never had to speak to anyone but him and everything was always very transparent. I appreciate the right people took my call that day. Thank you always, and ride safe 🤙🏽

I Am beyond grateful for the exceptional legal support I received from Naseer Kahn of NK Law Group for his unwavering  dedication

He took my call, anyway.and he addressed the concerns I was having at that time. Who does that? Naseer did!!
During these 2 years he Always insured that I understood the process and the options I had.  He let me make my own decisions. Never pressuring me one way or another His hard work and dedication to my care and well-being was evident throughout. Not once did I ever feel like I was just another client to him I knew he genuinely cared and that is something you will have a hard time finding in a lawyer. In the end he secured outstanding results for me. I can't give him enough praise and I will always be forever grateful for all the hard work, dedication, kindness, expertise  and knowledge he had.
I actually will miss the occasional conversations we had whether by calls or texts whenever I had questions or had concerns because he actually took the time to respond in a timely manner. It was evident he actually cared. When I needed someone to listen. He had something nice to say no matter what even when i had off the wall questions and I had Many! Now that'll my case is settled what reason will I have to call him for?  I'm sure he wouldn't mind if I called him just for any old advice about life in general. Nah I won't bother him I'm just kidding but I willi miss his kindness. If  you are looking for a professional and knowledgeable personal injury attorney, I highly recommend Naseer. He will do his best to take care of your legal matters.

While shopping at a local retail store, my foot was broken when a shelf fell from a display.  I suffered great pain and required surgery to remove the bone that was crushed when the shelf fell on it. After much back and forth, the retailer made an offer to me that I believed was not enough to compensate me for my medical and mental injury.  I reached out to Naseer at NK Law for help.  The bone that was crushed rarely happens so there is no real precedent on what the outcome would be.  Naseer and team educated themselves on the injury and remained persistent while dealing with unsympathetic, corporate attorneys who made it clear they would not budge on their original offer.  He explained the process throughout each phase leading up to our arbitration meeting with the retailer.  Patience prevailed and I wound up reaching a settlement that was far better than had I not chosen NK Law to represent me.

I give Naseer a thumbs up and would highly recommend him.

Naseer was very communicative, helpful, and made the process of getting my settlement as headache free as possible.

What: Accident back in January deemed not at fault for both parties by police report. Got mail in the letter from my insurance stating I was not at fault.

About a month later they tell me they cashed out the other party from my policy. I ask why and gave me terrible/dodgy explanations about how their injuries were too significant. I had significant injuries too! I inquired and of course insurance was not willing to give me anything and were extremely dodgy. Had enough of that noise and don't have time to spare with dodgy insurance negotiations.

The situation was too ridiculous to not get a lawyer. I looked around for attorney/lawyer next few days and then I found Naseer. I gave him the information about the situation and said it was likely to be in our favor. Fast forward to this month got a solid settlement higher than our initial offering a few months prior. Definitely do not regret the decision!

Thank you Naseer / NK Law Group.

Keyes Law Group has been helping me with my Will & Trust for the last 6 years, and they have been incredibly helpful in helping me in planning the eventual distribution of my most precious belongings (& of course my financial estate.)

I try to live a rich life. I expect to continue exploring & living a new adventure every day. But I expect that one day I'll complete my last quest. I'll start finding my voyages along the pathways of my local park. When I cease these jaunts & dream my last dream, my story still won't be complete.

I will have gifted my dearest friends & family a hunger for our wonderful world, and my will & trust will provide them with some coin to assist them in realizing their dreams. I hope that their life will be as rich & wonderful as mine, and that my modest final gift made a difference in their lives.

Thank you, Keyes Law, for helping me to bring joy after I've finished my story to those who added joy to every chapter of my life.

reviews.text:
How can you rate the best of the best? Five stars isjust not enough.  The Keyes Law Group delivers more than just results, they deliver peace of mind.

A dear friend of mine had extreme medical issues that left him in a vegetative state.  His siblings live in India.   We needed help.  Elijah and team were that help.   In our first meeting, he described what may happen legally, how it is different from the laws in India, how the process works, and what we needed to do.  He walked everyone in the room through the process making sure he addressed everyone's concerns, and explained it all in simple, easy to understand terms.    We hired the Keyes Law Group immediately.

They walked us through conservatorship, trust, will, and made it all happen with the courts.

Kathy B was with me all the way.  She fielded emails, calls, worked with the courts, got me the paperwork I needed to keep pushing forward, knowing everything would be okay.

After my friend passed, we met with the team again.   They have grown, added Khouloud D. to the team.   The team explained to us the next steps, how to transition from Conservatorship to Trust,  and are working with us to get all the required reporting done.

From start to end?  a high class operation.   It comes from the top, caring about the clients, helping, explaining, and delivering.

If you have a legal problem, I cannot think of a better team to have in your corner!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your incredibly thoughtful review. Your kind words truly mean a lot to our entire team.

We’re honored that you trusted Keyes Law Group during such a difficult and emotional time helping families navigate complex situation situations, especially when they involve conservatorship, trusts, and court process, is something we take very seriously.

We’re glad Kathy, Elijah and Loudd and the rest of the team could support you every step of the way.
your recognition of the care, communication and dedication behind the work is deeply appreciated. We’re grateful to have been able to help bring clarity and peace of mind during such a challenging journey.

Thank you again for your trust and recommendation
